name: Joe Biden
subject: Humbly asking for $25 tonight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
Judging by his tweets and his fundraising scare tactics, it's pretty clear that Donald Trump watched our convention last week. |
---

Peter,

Judging by his tweets and his fundraising scare tactics, it's pretty clear that Donald Trump watched our convention last week.

In an email to supporters from last week, he said that I and all the other convention speakers hate him and anyone who stands with him.

I have to say two things: he's dead wrong, and he missed the entire point of our convention.

Our convention was an amazing display of what we Americans can accomplish if we come together and summon the best parts of us. We made it crystal clear that hate has no place in our party or our country.

**We also made it clear that this election is about hope and empathy -- so I 'm not going to try to scare you into donating just so I can raise a buck, Peter.**

[Instead, I want to humbly ask you, if you're able to fund a piece of our work today, will you chip in $25 to our Beat Trump Fund tonight? I know we've got a winning message and your contribution will help us share it with more voters.](https://go.joebiden.%3D%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020_beattrumpfund?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.24_B4_jrb_X__F1_S1_C1__full&amount=25&amounts=50,100,250,500&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.24_B4_jrb_X__F1_S1_C1__full") _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

**[Click here to express donate $25 >>](https://go.joebiden.%3D%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020_beattrumpfund?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.24_B4_jrb_X__F1_S1_C1__full&amount=25&amounts=50,100,250,500&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.24_B4_jrb_X__F1_S1_C1__full&express_lane=true")

[Click here to express donate $50 >>](https://go.joebiden.%3D%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020_beattrumpfund?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.24_B4_jrb_X__F1_S1_C1__full&amount=50&amounts=50,100,250,500&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.24_B4_jrb_X__F1_S1_C1__full&express_lane=true")

[Click here to express donate $100 >>](https://go.joebiden.%3D%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020_beattrumpfund?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.24_B4_jrb_X__F1_S1_C1__full&amount=100&amounts=50,100,250,500&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.24_B4_jrb_X__F1_S1_C1__full&express_lane=true")

[Click here to express donate $250 >>](https://go.joebiden.%3D%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020_beattrumpfund?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.24_B4_jrb_X__F1_S1_C1__full&amount=250&amounts=50,100,250,500&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.24_B4_jrb_X__F1_S1_C1__full&express_lane=true")

[Click here to express donate $500 >>](https://go.joebiden.%3D%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020_beattrumpfund?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.24_B4_jrb_X__F1_S1_C1__full&amount=500&amounts=50,100,250,500&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.24_B4_jrb_X__F1_S1_C1__full&express_lane=true")

[Click here to donate another amount >>](https://go.joebiden.%3D%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020_beattrumpfund?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.24_B4_jrb_X__F1_S1_C1__full&amount=100&amounts=50,100,250,500&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.24_B4_jrb_X__F1_S1_C1__full")** Like I said on Thursday night, I may be the Democratic candidate, but I will be an American president.

And when I promised the American people that I will work as hard for those who didn't support me as I will for those who did, I meant every word.

Now, as the Republicans are gearing up for three more nights of their convention, we've got to be serious about making sure we have what it takes to beat them on the ballot in November.

We know what's on their agenda -- four more years of corrupt, failed leadership.

So it's on us to do what it takes to put our country on a different path -- a path of hope, love, and light.

Kamala and I can't do this without folks like you having our backs, Peter. If you're not able to give today, that's more than okay, I know these are tough times to pull out your wallet for a political campaign.

[But if you are able to chip in $25 or anything tonight, it will make a difference in this battle for the soul of our nation, and I'm personally grateful for anything you can contribute.](https://go.joebiden.%3D%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020_beattrumpfund?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.24_B4_jrb_X__F1_S1_C1__full&amount=25&amounts=50,100,250,500&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.24_B4_jrb_X__F1_S1_C1__full")

[https://go.joebiden.com/Beat-Trump-Fund](https://go.joebiden.%3D%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020_beattrumpfund?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.24_B4_jrb_X__F1_S1_C1__full&amount=100&amounts=50,100,250,500&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.24_B4_jrb_X__F1_S1_C1__full")

Thanks for standing with Kamala and me,

Joe Biden
| | [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b7c8/1cd0ac28/16e807336/357f251a/3881486849/VEsHBA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.facebook.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b7c8/1cd0ac28/16e807336/357f2519/3881486849/VEsHBw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://twitter.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b7c8/1cd0ac28/16e807336/357f2518/3881486849/VEsHBg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.youtube.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b7c8/1cd0ac28/16e807336/357f2517/3881486849/VEsHAQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.instagram.com/joebiden")
---

Has the pandemic affected you personally, or do you just want to take a break from emails for a couple weeks? We understand. [**Click here to pause emails from the campaign for a two week period.**](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b7c8/1cd0ac28/16e807336/357f2516/3881486849/VEsHAA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/Take-a-Break?source=footer")

Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email, with a check, or with a spouse -- thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If we got your name or any information wrong -- we're so sorry! To update and correct your information [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b7c8/1cd0ac28/16e807336/357f2515/3881486849/VEsHAw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/update-your-information"). If you would like to receive fewer emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b7c8/1cd0ac28/16e807336/357f2514/3881486849/VEsHAg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). If you would like to unsubscribe, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b7c8/1cd0ac28/16e807336/357f2513/3881486849/VEsHDQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Unsubscribe").

Peter, thank you so much for supporting Joe Biden's Presidential campaign.

[ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b7c8/1cd0ac28/16e807336/357f2512/3881486849/VEsHDA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer&refcode=email-bsd-20190515host-b20_FDR_states_NA-F1_S1_C1")

This isn't the time to be complacent. If you are ready to fight for the soul of this nation, you can start by donating to elect Joe Biden by clicking the button below.

| [DONATE TO ELECT JOE BIDEN »](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b7c8/1cd0ac28/16e807336/357f2511/3881486849/VEsEBQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2019.08.07_B8_footer_X__F1_S1_C1__footer&amount=25")
---

We know we send a lot of emails, and we are sorry about that. The reason? We are relying on grassroots supporters like you (we're serious!).

But Peter, we don't want to bother you. If you'd like to only receive our most important emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b7c8/1cd0ac28/16e807336/357f2514/3881486849/VEsEBA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). If you'd only like to receive volunteer emails, [click here.](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b7c8/1cd0ac28/16e807336/357f2510/3881486849/VEsEBw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/volunteer-emails") If you'd like to unsubscribe from our emails, you can [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b7c8/1cd0ac28/16e807336/357f2513/3881486849/VEsEBg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Unsubscribe").

To make a contribution by mail, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b7c8/1cd0ac28/16e807336/357f250f/3881486849/VEsEAQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://joebiden.com/contribute-by-mail/") for instructions.

We sincerely thank you for your help and support.
\- The entire Joe Biden for President team
Paid for by Biden for President

name: Bill Hagerty
subject: Join us in nominating President Trump
body:
Tonight, delegates from across the country will officially nominate Donald Trump at the Republican National Convention!
Peter,Tonight, delegates from across the country will officially nominate Donald Trump at the Republican National Convention!I'm honored to have President Trump's endorsement and I proudly support his nomination for President. [**Will you join me?**](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-puludtk-fuutjhhtj-r/) [NOMINATE PRESIDENT TRUMP](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-puludtk-fuutjhhtj-y/) It's important that we stand together in support of our President right now. The left-wing mob and their allies in the liberal media are pulling out all the stops to attack his campaign.We can't let them win and we must show our support.Will you [**join me in nominating President Trump?**](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-puludtk-fuutjhhtj-j/) Thank you for your time.Bill Hagerty
Candidate for U.S. Senate (R-TN) | [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-puludtk-fuutjhhtj-t/)| [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-puludtk-fuutjhhtj-i/)| [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-puludtk-fuutjhhtj-d/)| [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-puludtk-fuutjhhtj-u/)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Muthoni=20Wambu=20Kraal=2C=20National=20Political=20&=20Organizing=20Director?=
subject: Counter Messaging Training- Wednesday at 5PM ET
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/4a9cd43ce2a3/counter-messaging-training-wednesday-at-5pm-et?e=d6c5c7d7ec)
---
| |
---
| |
---
| Dear Friends,

The Republicans gaveled their National Convention open this morning and will spend this week making their case to the American people. We need your help countering the many toxic messages and [abject lies](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=493c9ad417&e=d6c5c7d7ec) that will be coming from them with your stories about this #TrumpChaos Presidency and about the [difference it will make to elect Biden Harris](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=07ae5dd3aa&e=d6c5c7d7ec). There are still a lot of voters who are making up their minds.

As a New York Times article stated this morning, “Political conventions have sometimes created large enough swings to allow a trailing candidate — like President Trump this year — to make a comeback. Convention season was important to George Bush’s win in 1988, Bill Clinton’s in 1992 and George W. Bush’s in 2004...The conventions are when many people tune into the campaign for the first time." Your story could be a critical part of them taking an action...voting for Joe Biden and Kamala Harris.
The **DNC Best Practices Institute** is holding a training this **Wednesday, August 26 at 5:00PM** ET on the ways you can storytell and amplify; then we'll share critical insight on the misinformation and disinformation that's trying to harm the election of Vice President Biden and Senator Harris and how to spot it. Join us for **"How to Break Down Trump's Chaos, Lift Up Biden Harris 2020 and Spot Misinformation and Disinformation."**
---
| [REGISTER HERE](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=55d5bc847c&e=d6c5c7d7ec "REGISTER HERE")
---
| Following this training, the next day, you can start to use it! In what has been described as “a new level of unethical conduct” Trump will deliver his nomination acceptance speech from the South Lawn of the White House Thursday evening. He will do so with a live audience even though we’re still inside of a raging coronavirus pandemic. As he asks America for a second act, we need you to point out how Trump has cost us American lives, jobs, and stability. And we will provide you with salient pieces of Vice President Biden’s plans to fix this country from the wreckage of this #TrumpChaos presidency.

In fact, each day of the Republican convention, we are also releasing television and digital ads that you can share. And you'll see us holding Trump and Republican convention speakers accountable for any lies and misinformation, as we'll be fact checking in real time.

One final resource we want to offer is this [RNC Counter Convention Message Toolkit](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=419f7636ad&e=d6c5c7d7ec) that outlines the 5 steps that you or your organization can take to amplify.

We look forward to having you join us.

Yours in the Fight,

**Mũthoni **
National Political & Organizing Director
Democratic National Committee
---
|
---
| |
---
| _Copyright © 2020 DNC Community Engagement, All rights reserved._
This is a test distribution list.

**Our mailing address is:**
DNC Community Engagement430 S Capitol Street, SEWashington, DC 20003
[Add us to your address book](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/vcard?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=acfdb5d126)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/profile?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=acfdb5d126&e=d6c5c7d7ec) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=acfdb5d126&e=d6c5c7d7ec&c=6230fab914).

[](http://www.mailchimp.com/email-referral/?utm_source=freemium_newsletter&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=referral_marketing&aid=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&afl=1)
---
|

subject: 🔥 Trever Nehls Needs Your Support!
body:
The 2020 Sheriff's Race will be a close one. | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/c4e30bab7175/trever-nehls-needs-your-support-5073260?e=753f064b84)
---
| | |
---
| | |
# Friends,
Election Day is just **69 days** away. With emotions running high and the divide in our county deepening, the race for Fort Bend County Sheriff will be a close one. We need your support to ensure that Trever Nehls, a proven leader, is our next Sheriff.
---
| |
# Every dollar and every vote count this year more than ever before.
---
| Here is how you can help
---
| |
# [**$10**](https://TreverNehls.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=67238c6ce9b15abccd916be06&id=afa141971d&e=753f064b84)
---
| Will help us inform our supporters of exactly where, when, and how to vote. The Sheriff's Race is way down on the ballot.
---
| |
# [**$25**](https://TreverNehls.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=67238c6ce9b15abccd916be06&id=fe374adcae&e=753f064b84)
---
| Will help us run a joint campaign with Troy, that reminds voters to “Vote Nehls Twice”
---
| |
# [**$100**](https://TreverNehls.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=67238c6ce9b15abccd916be06&id=6ee7831c96&e=753f064b84)
---
| Will help us run a campaign targeting absentee voters, like college students, active military, and more.
---
| |
# [**$500**](https://TreverNehls.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=67238c6ce9b15abccd916be06&id=9e4a2abb6d&e=753f064b84)
---
| Will help us run ad campaigns to spread the word to a larger audience.
---

name: Josh Hicks
subject: The Postal Service
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Josh Hicks for Congress
body:
Last weekend, Congress went back to Washington and voted on a bill to save the United States Postal Service.

|
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18837279/241482914/1882163059?refcode=fl_em_fr_20200825USPS_JH_all_xx_xx_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4M2IwMTljZi1kZGU2LWVhMTEtOGIwMy0wMDE1NWQwMzk0YmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dsyXqhumgIF8KLVHjjO6jVbwXyYAN9uq6RVvi9LCWaw=)
| | Friends, Last weekend, Congress went back to Washington and voted on a bill to save the United States Postal Service. 150 Republicans — including my opponent — voted against this bill in one of the most obscene demonstrations of partisan politics I’ve ever seen. **Imagine being so politically motivated that you wouldn’t vote to save the damn Post Office.** I’m sure, over the last few weeks, you’ve heard a lot about the postal service. But I want to share why it means so much to me and this district.
* The USPS employs nearly 100,000 military veterans – folks who often struggle finding employment and settling back into life after returning home.
* Kentucky has the second-highest volume per capita of prescriptions delivered via mail in the country.
* The USPS delivers to rural areas with no additional charges while for-profit delivery companies often charge a surcharge, or simply won’t deliver to the far-reaching areas of our rural communities.

**In short, the USPS is a vital lifeline to so many folks in our community, and communities across the country.** This isn’t a partisan issue, and Kentucky deserves leadership in Washington who understands that. This vote is one I won’t forget, and I know you won’t either. Josh

Friend,

With 10 weeks until Election Day, Jon Ossoff's momentum continues to rapidly increase.

The polls have Jon in the lead or tied, and his opponent is so scared he stooped to running a disgraceful, anti-Semitic ad against Jon.

**Jon is well positioned to unseat Sen. David Perdue in November.**

But we're up against the entire GOP dark money machine that's desperately trying to stop a Democrat from winning in Georgia. _Mitch McConnell and his allies are spending TENS OF MILLIONS of dollars on our race!_

name: Mary & the TNDP Team
subject: Moving Forward for the Soul of our Nation
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE TENNESSEE DEMOCRATIC PARTY, DR
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP07/1/77134/images/Highres-transparent-tndp.png]
Dear Peter,
Last week was incredible for Democrats in the state and around the country: we held the first-ever virtual convention, we nominated a historic ticket, and here in Tennesee we honored the role of women in our progressive history featuring Tennessee Democratic women leaders during a live roll call appearance from Nashville.
Tennessee Shines during the DNC Roll Call
https://www.facebook.com/PutnamCoYoungDems/videos/733698167413935 [https://www.facebook.com/PutnamCoYoungDems/videos/733698167413935]
Replete with yellow roses and other symbols of the suffragette movement, these accomplished and extraordinary women cast Tennessee's delegation votes for the Biden/Harris ticket. Alexandra Petri of Washington Post lauded Tennessee's roll call vote, saying that the delegation used its brief time for a successful homage to the women who fought for the vote. [https://www.washingtonpost.com/] Watch the video. [https://www.facebook.com/PutnamCoYoungDems/videos/733698167413935]
http://business.facebook.com/123394135830/videos/3175214189180702/ [http://business.facebook.com/123394135830/videos/3175214189180702/]
Tuesday night, the TNDP hosted RATIFIED!, a 100th anniversary celebration of the 36 states responsible for ratifying the 19th amendment. This powerful roll call of states commemorated the day 100 years ago when Tennessee became the 36th state to vote YES to expand women's rights. [https://business.facebook.com/123394135830/videos/3175214189180702/]
https://www.wmcactionnews5.com/2020/08/18/watch-tennessee-state-sen-raumesh-akbari-speaking-tuesday-night-democratic-national-convention/ [https://www.wmcactionnews5.com/2020/08/18/watch-tennessee-state-sen-raumesh-akbari-speaking-tuesday-night-democratic-national-convention/]
Tennessee State Senator, Raumesh Akbari took the mainstage to deliver a keynote address. She discussed Joe Biden's advocacy for women's rights and where he'll lead the country the next four years. [https://www.wmcactionnews5.com/2020/08/18/watch-tennessee-state-sen-raumesh-akbari-speaking-tuesday-night-democratic-national-convention/]
At the TNDP Delegate breakfasts during the week, we heard from Marquita Bradshaw [https://www.marquitabradshaw.com/] , our nominee for U.S. Senate. Marquita is a community organizer, a warrior for progressive causes, and the only black woman running for the U.S. Senate this year. We also heard from former U.S. Senator Heidi Heitkamp, who raved about and endorsed TNDP rural caucus vice chair and candidate for state senate, Chase Clemoons [https://chasefortn.com/] . W e heard from Gabby Salinas [http://voteforgabby.com/] , our candiate state House District 97, who is campaigning to expand Medicaid in Tennessee. We heard from Mariah Phillips [https://www.mariah4tn.com/home] , a mother and teacher, who is seeking to ensure a safe and rewarding educational experience for all of Tennessee's children.
Women remain deeply underrepresented at every level of government. We need to use this historic election to continue to empower women by electing them up and down the ballot.
It's this energy - this mission to change the face of government as we know it - that's the key to success this election. Working together we must take this inspirational message of change, opportunity, and compassion to everyone in the Volunteer State. We must work to turn out every voter—from the party faithful to Republicans disgruntled with a reckless GOP to non-voters who feel let down by the status quo.
We got our marching orders from nearly every speaker we heard from. For the next ten weeks, we will draw on the strength of the women who came before us - from Ida B. Wells to Shirley Chisholm to Lois DeBerry - to put Joe Biden and Kamala Harris in the White House and flip as many seats from red to blue as we can. Let's get to work.
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP07/1/77134/images/signature2.png]
Mary Mancini
Chair, Tennessee Democratic Party
WE NEED YOUR HELP TO WIN
Here's the reality: August is traditionally one of the hardest months to raise money in politics. And because of COVID-19, the Tennessee Democratic Party's resources are stretched thin. Given how this crisis will impact our economy, we are expecting a significant loss of revenue in the coming months which will impact our ability to win elections up and down the ballot this fall. Our staff, our offices, our voter protection program, our get out the vote program, our outreach programs, and our organizing capabilities all depend on the resources we can raise right now. With so many amazing women candidates on the ballot, we can't afford to let them down.
We need you in this fight alongside us. THANK YOU!
https://secure.ngpvan.com/oNKhpMgsTk-zA4pXE2fn4w2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/oNKhpMgsTk-zA4pXE2fn4w2]
PAID FOR BY THE TENNESSEE DEMOCRATIC PARTY, DR. GEETA MCMILLAN, TREASURER NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE. CONTRIBUTIONS OR GIFTS TO TENNESSEE DEMOCRATIC PARTY ARE NOT TAX DEDUCTIBLE.
Tennessee Democratic Party
319 Plus Park Blvd
Nashville, TN 37217
United States

Marquita is a community organizer, a warrior for progressive causes, and the only black woman running for the U.S. Senate this year. We also heard from former U.S. Senator Heidi Heitkamp, who raved about and endorsed TNDP rural caucus vice chair and candidate for state senate, Chase Clemoons [] . W e heard from Gabby Salinas [] , our candiate state House District 97, who is campaigning to expand Medicaid in Tennessee. We heard from Mariah Phillips [] , a mother and teacher, who is seeking to ensure a safe and rewarding educational experience for all of Tennessee's children. Women remain deeply underrepresented at every level of government. We need to use this historic election to continue to empower women by electing them up and down the ballot. It's this energy - this mission to change the face of government as we know it - that's the key to success this election. Working together we must take this inspirational message of change, opportunity, and compassion to everyone in the Volunteer State. We must work to turn out every voter—from the party faithful to Republicans disgruntled with a reckless GOP to non-voters who feel let down by the status quo. We got our marching orders from nearly every speaker we heard from. For the next ten weeks, we will draw on the strength of the women who came before us - from Ida B. Wells to Shirley Chisholm to Lois DeBerry - to put Joe Biden and Kamala Harris in the White House and flip as many seats from red to blue as we can. Let's get to work. [] Mary Mancini Chair, Tennessee Democratic Party WE NEED YOUR HELP TO WIN Here's the reality: August is traditionally one of the hardest months to raise money in politics. And because of COVID-19, the Tennessee Democratic Party's resources are stretched thin. Given how this crisis will impact our economy, we are expecting a significant loss of revenue in the coming months which will impact our ability to win elections up and down the ballot this fall. Our staff, our offices, our voter protection program, our get out the vote program, our outreach programs, and our organizing capabilities all depend on the resources we can raise right now. With so many amazing women candidates on the ballot, we can't afford to let them down. We need you in this fight alongside us. THANK YOU! [] PAID FOR BY THE TENNESSEE DEMOCRATIC PARTY, DR. GEETA MCMILLAN, TREASURER NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE. CONTRIBUTIONS OR GIFTS TO TENNESSEE DEMOCRATIC PARTY ARE NOT TAX DEDUCTIBLE. Tennessee Democratic Party 319 Plus Park Blvd Nashville, TN 37217 United States

name: Jason Yates
subject: Join us TONIGHT for the Voter Registration Sunday Webinar
body:
Peter,
Join us tonight, August 25, 7 PM ET, for a [special webinar](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=iKj5iuxBXy-0B6ifolAJk7dCg1thFzBZiqLuYRLPpJ_aHCKCWDrLcQEL7TYWkbyiHa_t43PzNA6KE-JPldkBWXVpEmDVPSZnkmrsVPn8E5g&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200825com01&n=1) to equip you to bring **National Voter Registration Sunday** to your church on September 20, 2020.
More than 15 million Christians in America are not even registered to vote. Your involvement and your church’s participation can help change that.
When you attend the webinar you will receive a step-by-step guide and a non-partisan toolkit of resources with everything you need to help other believers register to vote.
Please [RSVP](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=iKj5iuxBXy-0B6ifolAJk7dCg1thFzBZiqLuYRLPpJ_aHCKCWDrLcQEL7TYWkbyiHa_t43PzNA6KE-JPldkBWXVpEmDVPSZnkmrsVPn8E5g&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200825com01&n=2) below. We look forward to talking with you this evening.
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=iKj5iuxBXy-0B6ifolAJk7dCg1thFzBZiqLuYRLPpJ_aHCKCWDrLcQEL7TYWkbyiHa_t43PzNA6KE-JPldkBWXVpEmDVPSZnkmrsVPn8E5g&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200825com01&n=3)
**Pray. Think. Vote.**
Jason Yates
CEO
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200825com01&n=4)
**
P.S.** Please send this webinar invitation to your pastor or church leaders to join us for the Voter Registration Sunday webinar on August 25. They can learn more about National Voter Registration Sunday [here](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=lROsI8Y7B9BWlZ2-cpdKXIKkeSI4MrcIhR7-Og50mNElvZOspC_AA5USuqBlKgAR&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200825com01&n=5).
©2020 My Faith Votes
10940 S Parker Rd, #640, Parker, CO 80134
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com).
To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/unsubscribe?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200825com01&n=6).

name: Greg Stanton
subject: Let's Make History! Biden-Harris 2020
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stanton for Congress
body:
**Last week, Senators Joe Biden and Kamala Harris ****made history by formalizing their nomination and rallying our party to take on Donald Trump and the GOP in November****.**

I am confident that the Biden-Harris presidential ticket will not only be historic, as Sen. Harris could become the first Black woman to hold the vice-presidency, but they are also prepared to meet the moment because of their combined experience and leadership ability. I am confident they have what it takes to guide the country through the economic and public health crises that continue to harm American families.
**[We need everyone to do their part during this final push to November. Can you rush a contribution to help my campaign, and help President Biden and Vice-President Harris in Arizona?](https://act.myngp.com/el/qH9FdtuXH8Cf-35p4kKcrE-g7ZVMR5ldu4yA7KyQ2KU=/tgNlbYXYKKyTeOOg5UrrgWFXK98Ns0727kBxpaoL0BE=?refcode=X_080720_EnviroMessaging_C)**

**Team, folks here at home are getting screwed by people in Washington.** Political insiders and special interests use their connections to get handouts and favors behind closed doors at the expense of hard-working people, and _that needs to change._

While Scott Perry has spent his time in Congress representing his special interest backers over the people in our communities, Eugene has dedicated his entire career as a public servant to leveling the playing field for everyday people. He’s held the powerful to account and fought for the issues that really impact folks here in PA.

**Bottom line, we need a leader tough enough to stand tall and _punch back_ , and there’s no doubt that leader is Eugene. **

[**In this people-powered campaign, your $5, $25, $100 contributions really do make a difference in our ability to continue airing ads and reaching voters. clean_body: We need a leader tough enough to punch back. = Team, Today, we released our newest TV ad showcasing Eugene’s determination to stand up for South Central Pennsylvanians in Congress.= = | = Team, folks here at home are getting screwed by people in Washington. Political insiders and special interests use their connections to get handouts and favors behind closed doors at the expense of hard-working people, and that needs to change. While Scott Perry has spent his time in Congress representing his special interest backers over the people in our communities, Eugene has dedicated his entire career as a public servant to leveling the playing field for everyday people. He’s held the powerful to account and fought for the issues that really impact folks here in PA. Bottom line, we need a leader tough enough to stand tall and punch back , and there’s no doubt that leader is Eugene. = = | = ---|--- = | = = | = = Thank you for all you do, Team Eugene We know that COVID-19 has impacted so many in our community, and we have adapted our campaign to this changing environment. name: MAGASOTA
subject: Standing United in Hugo
body:
| What is unity? Unity is standing together UNITED in the face of danger or the unknown, supporting each other at all costs. That is exactly what the patriots did on Saturday in Hugo. Last week Senator Roger Chamberlain planned an event in Hugo, MN in response to the leftist thug John Thompson terrorizing that fine community. It was a unity event for the citizens of Hugo. **At the last minute Roger cancelled the event**. His reason was threats of violence. We know this is not true. He was told by party leadership to cancel the event. As I was boarding a plane bound for Minnesota on Friday morning a good friend reached out to me. She was very upset that this event was cancelled. __ **_Hundreds of people had already committed to attend!_** She asked if I could help. My first reaction was to help. My second thought was to not. **_The republicans organized the event and cancelled it. Let them look like schmucks!_** I was so disgusted to hear the reasons for cancelling this event. _If hundreds of citizens are willing to attend why would Roger Chamberlain cancel?_ We expect leadership and our elected officials to stand with us. **How embarrassing for our side to cower to the leftists. Again!** I committed to seeing that event go forward after watching the video of John Thompson terrorizing the citizens of Hugo. It made me sick and angry. These leftist radicals are hell bent on destroying America. And now our suburbs are under attack. Action was taken immediately to keep this event going. Phone calls and text messages were going out to inform people that the event was going forward. Hours before the event thousands of emails were sent. Patriot groups in Minnesota posted to social media to attend. With less than 24 hours we had some amazing speakers and a great turnout. Many amazing patriots were there to help this event be a success. The residents of Hugo were so thankful and so grateful that the event went forward. They needed reassurance that fellow citizens were standing with them. Attendees expressed their disappointment that republicans were too afraid to lead an event in Hugo. **Once again it was the grassroots that saved the day**! _The patriotic, freedom and liberty loving citizens did not back away from the unknown._ It was so beautiful to see so many people there. It was a sight of unity for sure. _Unity for Hugo and unity for Minnesota._ _Here is drone footage from Twin Cities Drone Media._ _[https://drive.google.com/file/d/1OcIlefl-1aQgnOtZlJ4dVyyzdhdZxCwQ/view](https://www.magasota.com/r?u=9g-hQKRcSqWoOTpvxkNQHxn3i1LqqUTzTetgJNEvAi3rc99SwIVmfMCp5ukUeO5YKHSPXieG7ZGtGlGlG0xDCmfm36CMvK685PVPx1yL9tk&e=ae7c075f3228267010e570c56948845c&utm_source=magasota&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=stand_united&n=1)_ Sadly, several hours later the swampy establishment republicans took to social media to complain about the event. They complained about how the program was run and criticized the event participants. It was quite pathetic. Their complaints were petty, childish and mostly lies. There were no congratulations and well done. Others accused MAGASOTA for taking this event and co opting it for nefarious reasons. _When will these people ever stop?_ I wasn't looking to help lead an event the day after I returned home from a summer vacation, an event was looking for a leader (thanks to the weak-kneed republicans). _By the way, a former republican house rep from that district attended. A current senator attended along with other candidates running for office.**How is it they were not scared but Roger Chamberlain was?**_ _The contempt the establishment holds for the grassroots is disgraceful, they may as well have called us “deplorables”._ For putting this together in less than 24 hours, everyone should be patting themselves on the back. Instead, we get stabbed in the back by swamp creatures. **Honestly, we don’t need their approval and we aren’t asking for it.** _The swamp runs deep in Minnesota friends and it’s time to drain it._ We should be tired of republicans that continue to grow government, steal our tax dollars and spend it on wasteful unnecessary projects and programs, republicans that spend our money financing public paid abortions. Republicans and democrats that do nothing to protect our freedom and liberty but rather infringe on our rights everyday.

Let’s get busy Minnesota and take care of our state.

**What can you do?** **MAGASOTA is making phone calls to citizens living in Minnesota to encourage support for President Trump. We need you on the phone.** **** **We have our literature printed and team members are going door to door asking people to support our President. We need you at the door.** **** **We need your financial support to compensate callers and produce our literature.** **With 71 days left we can’t wait until tomorrow!**

www.magasota.com/contribute

-Michele Even

MAGASOTA
[http://www.magasota.com/](http://www.magasota.com/?e=ae7c075f3228267010e570c56948845c&utm_source=magasota&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=stand_united&n=2)
---
-=-=- MAGASOTA · MN 55372, United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www.magasota.com/unsubscribe?e=ae7c075f3228267010e570c56948845c&utm_source=magasota&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=stand_united&n=3). -=-=-
Created with [NationBuilder](https://www.magasota.com/r?u=SWqLExi-4iBlEOa5qgO58jA2d62deOsOLwOgchKDecY&e=ae7c075f3228267010e570c56948845c&utm_source=magasota&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=stand_united&n=4), software for leaders.

| Hoosier Republican,

_We need all hands on deck for this race._

The national Dems – Nancy Pelosi, Elizabeth Warren, Kamala Harris, Pete Buttigieg, The Squad, and Barack Obama – have targeted a congressional district right here in Indiana and endorsed the liberal candidate, Christina Hale.

Conservative Victoria Spartz is ready to go to Washington to fight this liberal Democrat machine.

**The Cook Political Report has classified this race a “toss-up,” after being held by Republicans since 1993! It would be absolutely devastating to lose this seat – and would almost assuredly dash our chances of winning back the House majority**.

Can you imagine another term with Nancy Pelosi in the Speaker’s Office? Nobody should have to picture that – which is why we need everyone to chip in now.

[**Will you please donate $5, $10, $25, $50, $100, $250, or what you can right now to elect Victoria Spartz?**](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=db46e272ae&e=1acd9bb3d6)

Keeping this seat RED is a major factor in winning back our majority in the House and finally firing Speaker Pelosi. We absolutely cannot let the national Dem machine win it.

We’re counting on Hoosiers like you to step up and chip in. If everyone donates just a few dollars, we’ll be able to fight back against the Pelosi-Warren-Harris-Buttigieg-Obama machine and win this one for Victoria and the Republican Party.

Thanks,
Indiana GOP

name: Dave Loebsack
subject: Just 70 days left

In order to keep tackling the toughest issues facing our state, we need to protect and grow the House DFL Majority, flip the Minnesota Senate, and take back the White House. **Will you make a contribution to our campaign today?** [**Make a contribution**](https://act.myngp.com/el/hvz4pi8ZIXxCYHLoV0HeOkMUrQNGgki20CKgtC7MXKo=/gsLib4iVkRDQr5hRCHH1oeJdHbBB2pA024agMEW5BQE=?refcode=082520) Who we elect together this November matters. name: MJ Hegar
subject: The next Hurricane Harvey
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
Where is Sen. Cornyn's leadership on the challenges of today?

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891ff5/7f51f7bc/438c3114/4ef7c58f/2549672210/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | Peter,

Three years ago today, Hurricane Harvey made landfall in Texas, leading to floods that devastated communities across Texas. The response -- everyone coming together across our communities -- gave us all hope that real change was possible. It's a stark reminder, as we enter hurricane season in Texas, of why we need to set aggressive goals to fight climate change right now -- because if we wait, it's just going to keep getting worse. In 2008, I flew search and rescue missions in Galveston after Hurricane Ike, and I saw the devastation first-hand -- and just as Harvey was worse than Ike, the next big storm is going to be even more devastating than the last.

Our biggest challenges require decisive leadership from those in positions of power. As we look at the crises facing our country, we just don't see that from Sen. Cornyn: Joking as a devastating pandemic kills thousands and leaves millions more unemployed in our state, taking zero action to face head-on the increasing threat of climate change, deflecting on pressing matters of policing and criminal justice reform and refusing to say plainly that Black lives matter.

**[It's why I'm running for Senate -- but I need your help to win. Pitch in to help me bring bold leadership and real solutions to our biggest challenges to the Senate. ](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891ff5/7f51f7bc/438c3114/4ef7c58e/2549672210/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE5ODYifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-finalcountdown?refcode=email_20200825.1nd__1986__&amount=10")**

Texas can't afford six more years of Sen. Cornyn, and I'm counting on you to help me defeat him. \-- MJ

| [DONATE](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891ff5/7f51f7bc/438c3114/4ef7c58e/2549672210/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE5ODYifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-finalcountdown?refcode=email_20200825.1nd__1986__&amount=10")
---

|
---

| It's clear we need a real leader for Texas and a Senate that prioritizes our health care. **[More than ever, we're relying on online fundraising to keep building the campaign we need to win in November, and we greatly appreciate your continued support>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891ff5/7f51f7bc/438c3114/4ef7c58d/2549672210/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE5ODYifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-covidfooter?refcode=1986&amount=10")**

However, we know this is not an easy time for many. If you'd like to pause receiving fundraising emails for the next few weeks, **[please let us know here](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891ff5/7f51f7bc/438c3114/4ef7c58c/2549672210/VEsD/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/s/mj-covid-fewer-emails")**. We'll still keep in touch with important information and to ask your thoughts from time to time.
---

name: Carole King
subject: nauseating
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
The consequences of another four years of Trump's inability to lead are unimaginable. |
---
| [](https://go.joebiden.%3D%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020_beattrumpfund?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.25_B1_carole_X__F1_S2_C1__full&amount=100&amounts=50,100,250,500&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.25_B1_carole_X__F1_S2_C1__full")
---
**Peter, I 'm just going to say it:**

**The Republican National Convention is nauseating.**

With all the Republican sycophants parroting Trump talking points, and none of them having the backbone to call out the head of their party for what he is, I'm going to do it for them.

Peter,

It’s Andrew Garbarino. Our home of Long Island has always been a refuge for liberty and conservative ideals in an otherwise liberal New York.

However, right in our backyard, the _**MOST RADICAL**_ , _**MOST LIBERAL**_ , and _**MOST DIVISIVE**_ politician in our country rules over New York City:

**Mayor Bill de Blasio! **

Bill de Blasio has always been a radical socialist! Many of the socialist policies that the Democrats champion now, Bill de Blasio was pushing in New York City back as early as 2014! In just the last couple of months, this is what has happened to NYC under Mayor Bill de Blasio’s leadership:

* There has been a **+177%** increase in the number of shootings in the city.
* He cut the New York City Police Department by over a _**BILLION**_ dollars.
* Over _**500,000** _New Yorkers have fled the city.

**The greatest city in the world has become a socialist nightmare. Democrats want to recreate this socialist nightmare on a national level in every city, town, and community around this country.**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Dana=20Barrett?=
subject: The Arrival of Fear Itself 😱
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dana Barrett for Congress_
body:
Are you letting fear get the best of you these days? When I feel fear, I |
---
| | [ ](https://electdanabarrett.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=602de950cf46fed73b950456c&id=c4f88ad8c8&e=e25784ff28)
---
| | Dear -

Last night was the opening night of the Republican National Convention and though the party had promised a positive, uplifting night, what they delivered instead was a repeat of the 2016 playbook, complete with divisive fear tactics and distortions of the truth.
---
| [ ](https://electdanabarrett.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=602de950cf46fed73b950456c&id=05d2257fca&e=e25784ff28)
---
| As a people, we cannot allow ourselves to fall prey to this kind of fearmongering. When Franklin D. Roosevelt gave his inaugural address in 1933, he said,

_"...let me assert my firm belief that the only thing we have to fear is...fear itself — nameless, unreasoning, unjustified terror which paralyzes needed efforts to convert retreat into advance."_

Last night the Republicans tried to make us afraid, but we cannot let them. This is the arrival of "fear itself" and we must see it for what it is. It is the "fear itself" that caused the massive divide in this country. It is the "fear itself" that has pit neighbor against neighbor, caused us to ignore science, and gave us an excuse to choose unethical leaders who only brought to the table a promise to save us from these false terrors.

But FDR also said, "In every dark hour of our national life a leadership of frankness and of vigor has met with that understanding and support of the people themselves which is essential to victory. And I am convinced that you will again give that support to leadership in these critical days."

That is the kind of leadership we need. I am committed to supporting the people of my district and of our nation, and to addressing the REAL issues this country is facing instead of creating false narratives to stoke fear. Are you with me? Will you [endorse our campaign](https://electdanabarrett.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=602de950cf46fed73b950456c&id=428540641f&e=e25784ff28), [volunteer](https://electdanabarrett.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=602de950cf46fed73b950456c&id=d421a9236a&e=e25784ff28), or [contribute today](https://electdanabarrett.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=602de950cf46fed73b950456c&id=c88c4c2b51&e=e25784ff28)?
---

name: Sri (personal), me, Sri Preston Kulkarni (3)
subject: did you see my note?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sri for Congress
body:
Friend,

I wanted to make sure you didn’t miss my message from last night.

If you haven’t already, please read my note below, and chip in $5 or whatever you can to help us power through.

I need you in this fight, friend. New polls show us TIED with Troy Nehls, but we also know that corporate PACs and dark money groups are swooping in at the last minute to prop him up against us.

They don’t care about our opponent’s extremist views or his corrupt record -- these groups just see a candidate who will put special interests first in Congress, and they know my campaign is a threat to their decades of influence in TX-22.

Anything you can give, will immediately go back out the door, and go towards our plan to win.

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sriq32020?refcode=em_fr_2020.08.25_spmspk_b1_all&amount=5

Thank you,
Sri

On Tue, Aug 24, 2020 at 6:02 PM Sri Preston Kulkarni wrote:

Below you'll find a longer and more personal note from Sri. If you've got a minute, we encourage you to read through the full email and hear directly from him on why we need your help more than ever. We're asking all supporters to step up with a $5 donation if they care about flipping this seat on November 3rd. If all of our supporters commit to this simple ask, we will be unstoppable. Donate here >> https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sriq32020?refcode=em_fr_2020.08.25_spmspk_b1_all&amount=5

Friend,

We’re 71 days away from the most important election of our lifetimes.

Consider this: in a little over two months, the future of our district -- the largest congressional district in the biggest swing state in the country -- will be determined by voters like you.

There are two very clear and very different paths that we can choose to take on Election Day. We can choose the path of continued division, of extreme ideologies funded by corruption and deceit.The path of politicians who are only in it for themselves and the special interests propping them up.

Or we can choose the path of reason and decency. The path of change. This campaign is unlike any other. Over the past three years, we have been building the most inclusive and diverse grassroots operation in the nation. We are building a coalition that reflects the district we are running in, which is the largest and most diverse district in the country. If we can win this way, we can prove to the world that dark money and special interests are no match for grassroots community engagement. We can start governing based on reason and the interests of the people, instead of political ideologies and special interests influence.

That’s why I’m running for Congress, friend -- and why, with just over two months left until our election, I’m asking you for your support.

We have only a few days to go until we reach September and the final two months of our campaign for change. Not only are we ramping up our campaign operations in the last two months, we’re also readying ourselves for the attacks that far-right dark money groups have been planning for the rest of the election cycle.

We know they’re building a well-funded war chest; in fact, they’ve earmarked $6.4 million in TV ads alone against us. That’s why, starting in early September, our campaign has a plan that will ensure we counter their ads across all platforms with our own positive message on bringing leadership to Washington to fight for our families.

We’re setting an incredibly ambitious end-of-month fundraising goal in order to raise the money for this effort, and we’re not relying on any dark corporate PAC money to get us there.

But in order to reach that goal and effectively fight back, we need your support now more than ever. That’s why I’m personally asking, if you can, to chip in $5 or whatever you can to jumpstart our end-of-month fundraising goal and ensure we’re ready for the final two months of this election.

Donate $5 or more to help us win: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sriq32020?refcode=em_fr_2020.08.25_spmspk_b1_all&amount=5

I’m grateful to have you in the fight, friend . With you by our side, I know that, on Election Day, we can and will choose the right path. We can bring the change to Washington that our families deserve -- and we will bring about the unity we need in our politics and our country.

Thank you,
Sri

Sri and our entire team hope you and your loved ones are staying safe and healthy during these trying times. As we work together as one nation to fight COVID-19, we know enormous financial and personal stress has been put on countless families. While we remain committed to doing all we can to flip this district and bring true leadership to TX-22, we understand that this may not be a good time for you to donate. We hope, however, that you'll continue to stay with us as we work for a better Texas.

Please visit our COVID-19 community resource guide [https://sri2020.com/covid-19-community-resources/] to find ways you can individually take action to support frontline responders and keep our family safe.

Sri Preston Kulkarni is a lifelong public servant and national security expert who has spent his career overseas working to protect Americans here at home. Growing up in Houston, Sri personally experienced the same challenges that our communities are facing today. In Congress, he’ll fight to lower the cost of prescription drugs, stand up to the gun lobby, address climate change, and bring common-sense solutions to Washington.
Help send Sri to Congress! ➜ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sriq32020?refcode=em_fr_2020.08.25_spmspk_b1_all&amount=5

Bringing true representation to TX-22. Learn more at https://sri2020.com/

Paid for by Sri for Congress
SRI FOR CONGRESS P.O. BOX 898 SUGAR LAND, TX 77487-0898 [#]

clean_body: Friend, I wanted to make sure you didn’t miss my message from last night. If you haven’t already, please read my note below, and chip in $5 or whatever you can to help us power through. I need you in this fight, friend. New polls show us TIED with Troy Nehls, but we also know that corporate PACs and dark money groups are swooping in at the last minute to prop him up against us. They don’t care about our opponent’s extremist views or his corrupt record -- these groups just see a candidate who will put special interests first in Congress, and they know my campaign is a threat to their decades of influence in TX-22. Anything you can give, will immediately go back out the door, and go towards our plan to win. Thank you, Sri On Tue, Aug 24, 2020 at 6:02 PM Sri Preston Kulkarni wrote: Below you'll find a longer and more personal note from Sri. If you've got a minute, we encourage you to read through the full email and hear directly from him on why we need your help more than ever. We're asking all supporters to step up with a $5 donation if they care about flipping this seat on November 3rd. If all of our supporters commit to this simple ask, we will be unstoppable. Donate here >> Friend, We’re 71 days away from the most important election of our lifetimes. Consider this: in a little over two months, the future of our district -- the largest congressional district in the biggest swing state in the country -- will be determined by voters like you. There are two very clear and very different paths that we can choose to take on Election Day. We can choose the path of continued division, of extreme ideologies funded by corruption and deceit.The path of politicians who are only in it for themselves and the special interests propping them up. Or we can choose the path of reason and decency. The path of change. This campaign is unlike any other. Over the past three years, we have been building the most inclusive and diverse grassroots operation in the nation. We are building a coalition that reflects the district we are running in, which is the largest and most diverse district in the country. If we can win this way, we can prove to the world that dark money and special interests are no match for grassroots community engagement. We can start governing based on reason and the interests of the people, instead of political ideologies and special interests influence. That’s why I’m running for Congress, friend -- and why, with just over two months left until our election, I’m asking you for your support. We have only a few days to go until we reach September and the final two months of our campaign for change. Not only are we ramping up our campaign operations in the last two months, we’re also readying ourselves for the attacks that far-right dark money groups have been planning for the rest of the election cycle. We know they’re building a well-funded war chest; in fact, they’ve earmarked $6.4 million in TV ads alone against us. That’s why, starting in early September, our campaign has a plan that will ensure we counter their ads across all platforms with our own positive message on bringing leadership to Washington to fight for our families. We’re setting an incredibly ambitious end-of-month fundraising goal in order to raise the money for this effort, and we’re not relying on any dark corporate PAC money to get us there. But in order to reach that goal and effectively fight back, we need your support now more than ever. That’s why I’m personally asking, if you can, to chip in $5 or whatever you can to jumpstart our end-of-month fundraising goal and ensure we’re ready for the final two months of this election. Donate $5 or more to help us win: I’m grateful to have you in the fight, friend . With you by our side, I know that, on Election Day, we can and will choose the right path. We can bring the change to Washington that our families deserve -- and we will bring about the unity we need in our politics and our country. Thank you, Sri Sri and our entire team hope you and your loved ones are staying safe and healthy during these trying times. As we work together as one nation to fight COVID-19, we know enormous financial and personal stress has been put on countless families. While we remain committed to doing all we can to flip this district and bring true leadership to TX-22, we understand that this may not be a good time for you to donate. We hope, however, that you'll continue to stay with us as we work for a better Texas. name: Jon Ossoff for Senate
subject: Fwd: Friend, this is the most important election of our lifetime
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JON OSSOFF FOR SENATE
body:
We need Jon and a Democratic Senate. |
---
Friend,

We can't stress enough the importance of this election. As the Obamas reminded us last week, the future of our democracy is literally at stake.

**And we not only need to defeat Donald Trump and elect Joe Biden and Kamala Harris -- we also need to give them a Democratic Senate.**

**To take back the Senate and start getting to work containing this pandemic, providing relief to the millions of Americans struggling, expanding health care access and voting rights, and fighting for the issues we all care about, we need to elect Jon Ossoff in Georgia.**

_And we've got a great shot. Jon is surging in the polls, and we saw record turnout in the June Democratic Primary._

But we can't win this race and retake the Senate without you. We're relying on _this small-dollar, people-powered team_ to compete with the GOP's dark money machine.

**[Right now, can you chip in $20 to help Jon win so we can start building a better America?](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2420/5b2c1286/3f8b8e3c/25f07232/1934938619/VEsH/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_08_21_jo_state_race?refcode=em_2020_08_25_jo_state_race_k&amount=20")**

Friend,

_This is the most important election of OUR LIFETIME._

**In November, we are making a decision about this country's future that will define us for generations.**

As Joe Biden said last night, "Character is on the ballot. Compassion is on the ballot. Decency, science, democracy. They are all on the ballot."

We can choose to create an America built on unity, decency, compassion, and integrity. A country where every citizen has great health care. Where voting rights are sacred. A country with equal justice under the law, and where dark money doesn't corrupt our political system.

clean_body: We need Jon and a Democratic Senate. | Friend, We can't stress enough the importance of this election. As the Obamas reminded us last week, the future of our democracy is literally at stake. And we not only need to defeat Donald Trump and elect Joe Biden and Kamala Harris -- we also need to give them a Democratic Senate. To take back the Senate and start getting to work containing this pandemic, providing relief to the millions of Americans struggling, expanding health care access and voting rights, and fighting for the issues we all care about, we need to elect Jon Ossoff in Georgia. And we've got a great shot. Jon is surging in the polls, and we saw record turnout in the June Democratic Primary. But we can't win this race and retake the Senate without you. We're relying on this small-dollar, people-powered team to compete with the GOP's dark money machine. name: Sandy Smith
subject: Report from the Republican Convention
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SANDY SMITH FOR CONGRESS INC
body:
| | | [ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=iSwa3j8Wp3Nxmng&b=PtK8BgflAI2PalFs.d5aEw)
---

Dear Peter,

**I am Sandy Smith, the Republican nominee for Congress in North Carolina’s newly redrawn 1st Congressional district. I'm also a delegate to the Republican National Convention, so I wanted to give you an update of what I'm seeing!**

I'm proud that our state is hosting the Republican Convention- not so proud however, that our freedom-hating Democrat governor tried to chase us away. How DARE he?
_**This is what the anti-American, anti-free speech Democrats do now, isn't it? They act like Republicans don't even have a right to exist!**_
In fact, the news here today is that Pelosi called Republicans the "enemies of the state".
Pelosi has gone full Stalinist. You never go full Stalinist. Rep. Steve Scalise from Louisiana was shot and almost killed by a deranged "Bernie Bro" because he believed Bernie's insane rhetoric like this.
**_If Pelosi's rhetoric gets someone killed, she should get tossed in jail as an accessory to murder._**

[ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=iSwa3j8Wp3Nxmng&b=rrScua1sm3vXGWNZ8tQ7kg)
---
[ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=iSwa3j8Wp3Nxmng&b=rrScua1sm3vXGWNZ8tQ7kg)
---

_But you know what gives me so much hope? All these great Americans coming together in support of President Trump._

**I was particularly pleased to meet fellow North Carolinian Madison Cawthorn, who will be the next Congressman from Western NC. I look forward to joining him next year!**

[ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=iSwa3j8Wp3Nxmng&b=rrScua1sm3vXGWNZ8tQ7kg)
---

**_The difference with the Democrat Convention is striking. They banished God; excuse violence; blame innocent people; disparage job creators; and call anyone who doesn't agree with them, a "racist". _**

You cannot govern a nation you hate, and yet, that's what Biden's Democrats are trying to do.

_THAT is why we must win. THAT is why we need to push hard here!_

**We are all God's children and Americans- and we need leadership who sees us as valued and equal!**

[If you agree with me, I need your help to change Congress and evict Pelosi!](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=iSwa3j8Wp3Nxmng&b=rrScua1sm3vXGWNZ8tQ7kg) Unlike Pelosi, unlike Butterfield, I will love America and help Americans!

[Can you help me take this swing district back](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=iSwa3j8Wp3Nxmng&b=rrScua1sm3vXGWNZ8tQ7kg), with your best and immediate contribution of $15, $35, or $250? Taking out my opponent, one of Pelosi’s leading lieutenants, would be a crippling blow to the Democrat Socialists and to Nancy Pelosi’s agenda.

G.K. Butterfield is awful, but to replace him I [really need your help](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=iSwa3j8Wp3Nxmng&b=rrScua1sm3vXGWNZ8tQ7kg). Our country needs us NOW! Let's stand up now, before it's too late!

For God and Country,
[ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=iSwa3j8Wp3Nxmng&b=rrScua1sm3vXGWNZ8tQ7kg)
---
Sandy Smith
Republican for Congress, North Carolina's new First District
Conservative
Entrepreneur & Military mom
[ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=iSwa3j8Wp3Nxmng&b=rrScua1sm3vXGWNZ8tQ7kg)
---
P.S. [Will you contribute $15, $60, $250, or your largest contribution?](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=iSwa3j8Wp3Nxmng&b=rrScua1sm3vXGWNZ8tQ7kg) I need to reach my goal to catch up with Butterfield.

PAID FOR BY SANDY SMITH FOR CONGRESS INC

P.O. Box 434
Winterville NC 28590
USA

[Unsubscribe](https://www.aweber.com/z/r/?rMyMrEwcrLQcbIyMTGxMzLRGtCzszCzMbExM) | [Change Subscriber Options](https://www.aweber.com/z/r/?rMyMrEwcrLQcbIyMTGxMzLRGtCzszCzMbExM)

name: Bill Olson
subject: The Fake News Stinks
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS
body:
Bill Olson for Congress

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hPL8RsWtwF6OuRU&b=RfLFHGkvHwBDMNI1w1lcwA

Hi Peter,

My name is Bill Olson, and I am a conservative Christian combat vet who just overwhelmingly won my primary, by 20 points! I am the new Republican nominee, running to take back Florida’s competitive 9th District, currently held by Socialist Democrat Darren Soto. And I will stand shoulder to shoulder with President Trump as we fight far-Left Socialism!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hPL8RsWtwF6OuRU&b=RfLFHGkvHwBDMNI1w1lcwA

The President loves trolling the left-wing media, we all know this, but he delivered a zinger this weekend.

During a Sunday press conference, President Donald Trump took a shot at the general left-wing bend of mainstream reporters by telling them that he hoped they all had a “great weekend” at their “convention,” referencing the Democratic National Convention (DNC).

“It’s good to see you all,” the president said to the press. “Hope you had a great weekend at your convention.”

Though there were rough ratings for the DNC, which was virtual due to coronavirus precautions, the media found themselves praising the convention.

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hPL8RsWtwF6OuRU&b=RfLFHGkvHwBDMNI1w1lcwA

The media fawned all over the awful Democrat Convention last week. Made fools of themselves, really.

“And then Michelle Obama starts talking, and we’re all like – none of us breathed for 18 minutes,” Maddow said.

Chief Washington correspondent for Politico and senior political analyst for CNN Ryan Lizza was even more open about his feelings for former President Barack Obama’s convention speech.

“Barack Obama just delivered the finest convention speech in modern history (again),” Lizza gushed on Twitter. “Spell-binding, chilling, optimistic, beautifully written, and expertly delivered. Incredible moment.”

These clowns are destroying our Republic with their open partisanship. the "thrill up their leg" approach to political analysis.

Really, they just hate us, our freedom, our country. They hold the American people in complete and open contempt.

Here's the good news: The American people see it for what it is!

A new poll released on Tuesday shows Americans have a growing distrust of the media, with an overwhelming majority saying the press have a political bias and nearly half saying news outlets display a "great deal" of bias.

The study from Gallup and the Knight Foundation shows that a whopping 86 percent of Americans believe media outlets lean one way or another politically, with 49 percent saying there's "a great deal" of bias while 37 percent say "a fair amount."

The poll noted an increase in the percentage of Americans who see too much bias in ostensibly objective reporting as a "major problem." According to the poll, 73 percent of Americans share that belief, up from 65 percent in 2017.

Meanwhile, a stunning 84 percent of Americans agree that "the media is to blame for political division in this country," though the same percentage also believe the media "can serve as a healing force."

Nearly nine out of ten Americans say the divisions in our country are the fault of the media. They will keep destroying us - unless we do something this year!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hPL8RsWtwF6OuRU&b=RfLFHGkvHwBDMNI1w1lcwA

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hPL8RsWtwF6OuRU&b=RfLFHGkvHwBDMNI1w1lcwA

Darren Soto, Joe Biden, and the Socialist Democrats will be shoved down our throats by the left-wing media, despite the derangement of Antifa in the streets.

We patriots must fight now or our country and our freedoms will be lost. Will you stand with me

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hPL8RsWtwF6OuRU&b=RfLFHGkvHwBDMNI1w1lcwA
?

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hPL8RsWtwF6OuRU&b=RfLFHGkvHwBDMNI1w1lcwA

I'm an unapologetic patriot. Joe Biden won't stand up for our country. Darren Soto sure as heck won't- he votes with Pelosi 93% of the time!

But I have taken an oath to the Constitution- one that has no expiration date! I don't have big swampy PAC money, which is why I need your help to counter the media's lies!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hPL8RsWtwF6OuRU&b=RfLFHGkvHwBDMNI1w1lcwA

I am calling all patriots to help me to replace Socialist Darren Soto, and stand up for our freedoms as Americans! I am now the official Republican nominee, and I need your help to win in November!

I need your help to stand up FOR the Constitution and AGAINST Communism!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hPL8RsWtwF6OuRU&b=RfLFHGkvHwBDMNI1w1lcwA

Can you help me?

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hPL8RsWtwF6OuRU&b=RfLFHGkvHwBDMNI1w1lcwA
This is a swing district and we can take it back!

Can I count on you for a donation

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hPL8RsWtwF6OuRU&b=RfLFHGkvHwBDMNI1w1lcwA
today? I have a goal of $50,000 raised by the end of August to get on the air asap. That's why I need your help today!

I'm going to make sure the radical Democrats like Biden and Soto lose BIG this year - with your help!

Let's get this done!

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hPL8RsWtwF6OuRU&b=RfLFHGkvHwBDMNI1w1lcwA

Bill Olson

Combat Veteran of Multiple Wars

Supports President Trump

Not a Career Politician

Hard Core Conservative Fighter

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hPL8RsWtwF6OuRU&b=RfLFHGkvHwBDMNI1w1lcwA

P.S. I really need your help today

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hPL8RsWtwF6OuRU&b=RfLFHGkvHwBDMNI1w1lcwA
, so a conservative combat vet can retake this swing district that the Republicans held just earlier this decade. I can do this - WITH YOUR HELP!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hPL8RsWtwF6OuRU&b=RfLFHGkvHwBDMNI1w1lcwA
Thank you and God bless America! - Bill.

PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS

Bill Olson is a retired member of the United States Army. Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Army or the Department of Defense.

5 Halifax Ct
Marlton NJ 08053
USA

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Trump Directs Federal Agencies to Move into Low-Income ‘Opportunity Zones’
body:
President Trump ordered federal agencies to prioritize moving their offices to Opportunity Zones to spur investment in some of the nation's poorest | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=97e2816ed3&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **Trump Directs Federal Agencies to Move into Low-Income ‘Opportunity Zones’**

President Trump ordered yesterday for “federal agencies to prioritize moving their offices to Opportunity Zones to spur investment in some of the nation’s poorest neighborhoods,” Ebony Bowden reports for the _New York Post_.

“The move will apply to all federal agencies and asks that they stop prioritizing city centers and central business districts and instead base themselves in any of the 8,769 low-income communities designated as Opportunity Zones by the Trump administration.”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=6db5a6d66e&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “The shackles have been removed from the private sector. When Covid-19 hit, the President signed an executive order, designed to jumpstart the economy, directing agencies to ‘remove barriers to the greatest engine of economic prosperity the world has ever known: the innovation, initiative and drive of the American people,’” James Schultz writes for [CNN](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=1b73a89fe5&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “Through our Farmers to Families Food Box Program, we are supporting over 200 farms and distributors and over 5,000 American jobs. This program is working for everyone, which is why we will provide an additional $1 billion for our Farmers to Families Food Box Program,” Ivanka Trump writes in [_The Fayetteville Observer_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=f83063b49e&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “Communism is fundamentally expansionist, seeking to swallow its neighbors and snuff out democracy, its mortal enemy. At a time when communism is growing in power and popularity, it would be wise for Americans and all freedom-loving people to remind ourselves about the mortal danger of the ideology of Marx, Lenin, Stalin and Mao,” Marion Smith writes in [_The Hill_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=3ea06a8f80&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=4624d3f8b6&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=4ed27622ac&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=37b7cffdaa)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

subject: Peter, can we send you this sticker?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
We want you to help show your support for the campaign. |
---

Peter --

The first night of the Republican National Convention was an important reminder of just how _stark_ the contrast is in this race for the White House.

We all know in our bones that this election is the most important of our lifetimes, and the very soul of the nation is on the line.

So, even in the socially distanced reality we find ourselves in, we're still going ALL-IN to reach every single voter and generate huge voter turnout for Joe Biden.

And we want you to help show your support for the campaign in Cresco by chipping in $25 or any amount into our Beat Trump Fund to get your own "46" sticker, and recognize our next and 46th President of the United States, Joe Biden!

By contributing to receive a sticker, not only will you be helping fund our work to elect Joe to the White House, but you'll be able to proudly display your support in your community!

[So what do you say, Peter? After last night's reminder at the RNC of what's at stake in this landmark election, can you chip in any amount to our Beat Trump Fund to elect Joe Biden and get a sticker mailed to your home?](https://go.joebiden.%3D%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_btf_46_sticker?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.25_B2_46sticker_X__F1_S1_C1__full&amount=100&amounts=50,100,250,500&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.25_B2_46sticker_X__F1_S1_C1__full") | [](https://go.joebiden.%3D%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_btf_46_sticker?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.25_B2_46sticker_X__F1_S1_C1__full&amount=100&amounts=50,100,250,500&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.25_B2_46sticker_X__F1_S1_C1__full")

Peter, thank you so much for supporting Joe Biden and Kamala Harris's Presidential campaign.

[ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b7d5/1cd0ac28/16e0d40da/357f2c6f/598314757/VEsHBg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer&refcode=email-bsd-20190515host-b20_FDR_states_NA-F1_S1_C1")

| [DONATE TO ELECT JOE AND KAMALA »](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b7d5/1cd0ac28/16e0d40da/357f2c6e/598314757/VEsHAQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2019.08.07_B8_footer_X__F1_S1_C1__footer&amount=25")

But Peter, we don't want to bother you. \- The entire Joe Biden for President team

name: Lisa Scheller
subject: Farmers for Scheller
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lisa Scheller for Congress, Inc
body:
**LISA SCHELLER RELEASES SECOND COALITION TODAY “FARMERS FOR SCHELLER”** FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE
Brooke Race
Info@schellerforcongress.com

Allentown, Pa. – Today, the Scheller Campaign is proud to announce its second coalition, Farmers for Scheller. Lisa Scheller strongly stands with farmers and the agriculture community and is eternally grateful for the hard work they do every day to put food on your table. Arland Schantz, chair of Farmers for Scheller, has been the owner and operator of Evergreen Farm, a hay, field crop, and evergreen tree farm since 1979. He has a seventh generation descendent to live on an operating the family farm

Arland released the following statement:

“Lisa’s time on my farm was enhanced, as she was able to further become aware about the “Farm Programs”, as well as Issues & concerns farmers face, as they attempt to bring them to the attention of their Representatives in Government. It’s noteworthy to say Lisa demonstrated sincere interest in learning what farming is all about. It’s also noteworthy to add her interest and seriousness about being a voice for farmers.
