name: Gina Raimondo
subject: Immunizations
body:
Your RI COVID-19 News Update
---
| | | | | |
---
| Hello friend,
We've talked a lot about the impacts of distance learning on our kids. One of the most concerning impacts we've seen was a dramatic decline in childhood immunizations. The closures of doctor's offices, coupled with changing routines and closures of immunization clinics in schools, led to a nearly 50% drop in immunizations in March, April and May compared to the previous year. Working with our pediatricians, we launched an aggressive campaign to turn that trend around, and by June we were only 8% below the previous year - a dramatic improvement, but there's still more work to do. So, if you have a child, please make sure they are fully vaccinated.
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001WjeiNiNIrYU9QWoU3ESPG0T40Uw7WTC9TecioarRb5HFwKEUhGStjrYUn846A3hg_4fnACgdxc0-BVvTzmZrPrBSGhPhzyMiA0hXI5fW7DJ1j4I20Tp-FsL8XBHrb1lmDy-8giHzCM34Sid7aTEJC0WfE3dPu8sNM6SyGToB0GKBL_T0xZtNM8lSEF1kSpJx3KvrGp85EB4=&c=gyD5CNX95SKCpPtfhEMQdaw1c9sl6ej8-NaopkKbLB3XT6lv2vPGmw==&ch=gaTQb9H7lUkFzPyrNY0RwuiMSH_G-E4Ovwm1N-kafs4X9tILcjUeCQ==)
---
| Click the graph to see check the Department of Health's [COVID-19 data dashboard](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001WjeiNiNIrYU9QWoU3ESPG0T40Uw7WTC9TecioarRb5HFwKEUhGStjrYUn846A3hg_4fnACgdxc0-BVvTzmZrPrBSGhPhzyMiA0hXI5fW7DJ1j4I20Tp-FsL8XBHrb1lmDy-8giHzCM34Sid7aTEJC0WfE3dPu8sNM6SyGToB0GKBL_T0xZtNM8lSEF1kSpJx3KvrGp85EB4=&c=gyD5CNX95SKCpPtfhEMQdaw1c9sl6ej8-NaopkKbLB3XT6lv2vPGmw==&ch=gaTQb9H7lUkFzPyrNY0RwuiMSH_G-E4Ovwm1N-kafs4X9tILcjUeCQ==).
---
| While we made up a lot of lost ground, the reality is that only 75% of kids entering Kindergarten this year have all their necessary immunizations, and it's even lower -- about 50% -- for kids entering 7th grade. As we make plans to get our kids back to school safely this fall, please make sure that your child has the immunizations they need. If they don't, please pick up the phone right now and call your pediatrician. If you or your child are currently uninsured, you can reach out to our health insurance exchange at 1-855-840-4774 to learn more about coverage. While we're facing a virus for which we don't yet have a vaccine, we can't take our eye off the ball and allow other childhood illnesses to resurge. Our pediatricians are taking extreme caution - keeping waiting rooms clear, using PPE, conducting infection control, and requiring health screenings. These protections are designed to mitigate risk of exposure to the virus. The biggest concern at this point is not vaccinating your child.
We're all in this together,
-Gina Raimondo Governor
---
| | Governor's Office | 82 Smith Street, Providence, RI 02903
---

name: Kamala Harris
subject: missing your endorsement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
I'm really hoping you can take a moment to add your name before the convention begins. |
---

Peter,

**You've already heard this from me, but let me say it again:** I'm _beyond_ excited to join my friend Joe, and this team, as his running mate.

I'm ready to get to work, win this election, rebuild our country, and serve you, the people.

Last week, our party's national convention showed Donald Trump, Mike Pence, and the whole country the full magnitude of the momentum behind our campaign.

That's why the team emailed you ahead of the convention to ask you to add your name and officially endorse our ticket.

**But Peter, I didn't see your name on our list of grassroots endorsers and I'm really hoping you can take a moment to add your name.**[Can you add your endorsement now?](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b7d7/1cd0ac28/16e3c693c/357f2829/837517127/VEsE/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/pet-endorse-the-ticket?source=JB_EM_PET_2020.08.16_B1_kdh-endorse_X__F1_S1_C1__nonopeners-ns_RS&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_PET_2020.08.16_B1_kdh-endorse_X__F1_S1_C1__nonopeners-ns_RS") | [YES, I'LL ENDORSE THE TICKET >>](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b7d7/1cd0ac28/16e3c693c/357f2829/837517127/VEsF/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/pet-endorse-the-ticket?source=JB_EM_PET_2020.08.16_B1_kdh-endorse_X__F1_S1_C1__nonopeners-ns_RS&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_PET_2020.08.16_B1_kdh-endorse_X__F1_S1_C1__nonopeners-ns_RS")
---
I'm thankful to be on this journey with you, Peter. Let's win this thing!

Your partner in the fight,

Kamala Harris

**P.S.** Endorsing our ticket is a great way to show that you believe in leaders who follow medical guidance, listen to the scientists, and yes, wear masks! I'm ready to get to work, win this election, rebuild our country, and serve you, the people. Last week, our party's national convention showed Donald Trump, Mike Pence, and the whole country the full magnitude of the momentum behind our campaign. That's why the team emailed you ahead of the convention to ask you to add your name and officially endorse our ticket. But Peter, I didn't see your name on our list of grassroots endorsers and I'm really hoping you can take a moment to add your name. "" | "" I'm thankful to be on this journey with you, Peter. Let's win this thing! Your partner in the fight, Kamala Harris P.S. Endorsing our ticket is a great way to show that you believe in leaders who follow medical guidance, listen to the scientists, and yes, wear masks! name: Defeat Disinfo
subject: 70 Days Out
body:
Our Window Is Closing | | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/mRshnjzLbfRUAJcmEcvG0wrDB7MtwPLuSSi4jwn1dr2AEKKvrxXLDWyyWUDJ9fIh3cA_yNrSXYaQXjbaKQCTUlofLJ4kmaD8hMQQrIvoxrfFVwq_P1_jqnJRrojYnzMT9NvRqY-qQY6o0GyXwEvYWdfBOr_DreqIsJ-58NVVfz6GnxYUtY7yOGKjEMN9E3Igf9g7-s4Q77j_tnEqPLvykKVq-0Tj-kt8HRK0-VYy_BS8lFloVWEbXs3As_UCXtzXYtTmAUwDX-eSp_uQM3RzlPFyrOhhmg95VjnBU5WP_jk/34m/o4RB2FFGR4mSz1gCQrY5Vg/h0/upYB62kH8l7gMvLW-eNl9fq0BSBtDjsH3hBKyMfjFIQ) Team —

In early October, the window to register to vote will begin to close across America. Shortly thereafter, those who have registered will have the opportunity to vote Trump out of office.

Among them will be Republicans who’ve jumped ship from their party, moderates seething for normalcy, and millions of Democrats who’ve waited four years for this moment.
[ ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xIsbYIYAaDaVM0NszyqqPOpuVE5NHWilB7LmOdivvZkQamBuP3fJO5uzdRm9vtmNSDK_voJtCTRoi5bA7aEfI4VudUFZnsoZnEuwbI6yK9nn4LNDOaFCDL42iZ-EB34zRRdVUuxBNXfg7xDE5GRLT6NWNUiRB1d3Z7e1CcwaE1rP39ItMQfS1CzwwDYgjBhlGPB711LpaV_X8i6IOqAUxdP-iSO5MFUVpzR2JbIwuKbL_x2hXGndoAUqoEcjxd2edcPOrdUVBVaeQD6rGOdqfTlDanVrVoEVe6BapwjOR066ZhpJ4uwAUU-qvaSbWn07_SZC1faBlhzh2e0rbU3otpwSdZnRJmVqzkPpnZ3oiKDN5MCdjqHj_rDuuz0IK1JOk/34m/o4RB2FFGR4mSz1gCQrY5Vg/h1/iYM3HQckj5e9zKvbh_OnZQdmFF309-pSJdc2TtNaWDM) The momentum to set the country back on course is on our side — but without high turnout, we could be looking at four more years of disinformation, division and the erosion of democracy.

Over the next several weeks, while we target Republicans along Trump’s campaign trail with our “COVID Safe Communities” campaign, we will also push for the high turnout we need among Democratic voters.

We are launching new creative campaigns each week, sourcing more peer-to-peer content than ever, and amplifying compelling stories from Biden supporters in the digital discourse. [ ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xIsbYIYAaDaVM0NszyqqPOpuVE5NHWilB7LmOdivvZkQamBuP3fJO5uzdRm9vtmNSDK_voJtCTRoi5bA7aEfI4czpull31v8YsUkm7Ujqo28D44NMM3AfGKNyNRFUX6wFvqyPYWIZq-bs_K5v8VrcU4JAvFgzI9XH3zPc9SgTcRAFqalxi5VAOVgYevGVXoBTp4iT0xknUYzTiZMk-LBjuoP9dXdNYXTt4qU8tzcHdZccujIHruTXZmOb1odd_F_xn85hsJHZ2aZI-NQCv00X7Lcmr36-1WTNTJQrzqJi_LwAs4FI_mrv1FX72t6R6j6YxYoDzaSniyovZZGm4Ea4FwFqOixYelvKLKfLdyiQbaqHFUc2h37sRUT69vv_oWbg/34m/o4RB2FFGR4mSz1gCQrY5Vg/h2/PWdWoo4GsIEkxUmcsvQg94u1mm3aM4vOhTNuyyGNl1g) No matter the means we employ, they are all means to the same end: **Defeat Donald Trump and elect Joe Biden on November 3rd**.

Thank you for your part in achieving that end.

The Defeat Disinfo Team

P.S. Fighting against Trump’s disinformation campaigns costs money. We know times are tough right now, but, if you can, [**chip in $5 to make sure Trump is a one-term president and competent leaders can start repairing the mess that he’s made.**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xIsbYIYAaDaVM0NszyqqPOpuVE5NHWilB7LmOdivvZkQamBuP3fJO5uzdRm9vtmNSDK_voJtCTRoi5bA7aEfI4p2owdBepDdU1WfAaH2qbQkDVrd8MHwp8n0JK0JiTgnmeiQJqKmUZRz9omyWx-n1xqDvb6-rxCnuwTu0WCX1acC1dCNzE0BVwlH8uXAPD5G10smMl4S7KAQ5wG42NYtLoE8z23xWtqFtbnBBurGaIHrlGrkiOwADh_y_aIXSt8448nRWObHcqmEvHd0WAW7eY37buUmOJ0hyj-rAFXvvhP3ipatGbFqyn_8mlynDpeIWypRQm97rCSsn8WjbgD9XGcX-aqZjNoiQba6exihsFCt_yCxAG0JOc90TVVKb6K5w/34m/o4RB2FFGR4mSz1gCQrY5Vg/h3/QSahGN5UzjpWInEplQQBnT2IAgiIcl8gYsnEO5gJSqU)

_If you were forwarded this email, you can subscribe to receive these weekly action updates on how to fight Trump's lies[here](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/mRshnjzLbfRUAJcmEcvG0wrDB7MtwPLuSSi4jwn1dr1_DLc95qdS5q8VoL6JM5VCk8uC-2juP5Wck7Qi6soLbOH0Pl2OuKvibe_r9tsI47XYZ7edriF4GEcgyc-eBBqxBXEtFALiP992UDF07O2t1Ndv71fNjiMxvf-mZ4iduCeqxcatEuBMpN9o20z2pbUPuAE-HqOo8EinQoh2e4HD8p0faJ8IUnjtJYop8gTISJw5_nEWWxMF46UnHaEsigI6IDCgvtXReFh1p_48ads5gOzdlENRV-CmsNdcLQSOyDQ/34m/o4RB2FFGR4mSz1gCQrY5Vg/h4/5pSrxHfXBYZtTMh94Tu_3FYVa-N94gnLVUVlS4cP0ag)._

name: Darin LaHood
subject: They’re not off the hook
disclaimer_text: Paid for by LaHood for Congress |
body:
Speaker Madigan and Governor Pritzker will do whatever it takes to dodge accountability for as long as they can [ ](http://links.lahoodforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d5887efe66684ada97976ef2e9d70137&_m=d0999009747b4de8bb596688cebe4677&_e=_xEX-pBz-leNAheRztf42vIos6p1YWu7kjZAPpwHRlCWrkhytmOWRgrDQjLsyh0op4uFrgkd7bal2PPFetWRKTiC1kW74eU9J-s-Fvh3WK8vFeD7TWWzHvKyxf1gCe7U8WoIJMGXY-A-GqiKqtFR_vA5AVFKb3AP8UU6Mcy0b9hXa95Mnsqe_85wgwvlLF7eOB5Ymy747GKh3_GyCLET8IYpGL6ogWzfS3PX_clMecXwnxOAqVW3RGAp8aT0YDEef1RnHX5Kg2-VCa7lLGjy_ly8j4KH7dfNwGmKGCupvfsMb2iO8wRk12R_uMIZLgBjJxgSx75zJNzMD5dJ-e2aeqV5UyeGSfiDZk_o0rAYRRuPC3jQXpnBWIAPu6VDucrpIR1ll3ezTEpJY3zGyRPJ4YSiV_9lKyIaY2cP7UkDcZHuezzB_7P_3CumpdgBU8_hT_O486lN0HXbDSneHo8wyRurXTaSF5niSvTjvc_4OoUKcVG8XcfZugm7KBcLKfwF) | |
---
Friend,

Mike Madigan’s and J.B. Pritzker’s latest political scandals are no longer being plastered all over the front pages of our news cycle – but that doesn’t mean they’re off the hook.

It’s not enough to simply call what they did to Illinois fraudulent, corrupt, or illegal.

_**We have to call it how it is.**_

Speaker Madigan sold out millions of energy consumers across Illinois by turning a blind eye to ComEd’s unlawful business practices and rate hikes – in exchange for over **$1.3 million** being funneled into his own pocket.

Meanwhile, J.B. Pritzker defrauded taxpayers and used his office to dodge over **$331,000** in property taxes by removing toilets from his Gold Coast mansion.

**We’ve all paid the price for their corruption – and that’s why it’s on us to hold them accountable.**
[**ADD YOUR NAME: STAND UP AGAINST THEIR CORRUPTION**](http://links.lahoodforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d5887efe66684ada97976ef2e9d70137&_m=d0999009747b4de8bb596688cebe4677&_e=_xEX-pBz-leNAheRztf42vIos6p1YWu7kjZAPpwHRlCWrkhytmOWRgrDQjLsyh0op4uFrgkd7bal2PPFetWRKTiC1kW74eU9J-s-Fvh3WK8vFeD7TWWzHvKyxf1gCe7U8WoIJMGXY-A-GqiKqtFR_vA5AVFKb3AP8UU6Mcy0b9hXa95Mnsqe_85wgwvlLF7eOB5Ymy747GKh3_GyCLET8IYpGL6ogWzfS3PX_clMecXwnxOAqVW3RGAp8aT0YDEef1RnHX5Kg2-VCa7lLGjy_th4YJ-sFODeN9lAZWTc01M9UiPAewrpwcGrLtcFvf_o6noy6JBLrp9TN8tUPPQvSs78kEJxu-ENJAtwtFfBZJ82_K2DxbODw27KQyY-Vw9hPIHhg0R6SSjzCYcqwHdii-jUOmqLjsRMq07-Zl5-XFoi5YcYYN0nMEsVkzeyNhuE9GrFVlIueCp3feLdayUfTz0FLGwlLGscZHXv470P6wuSqO2khuLV12_tkB3tLBae)
Governor Pritzker isn’t up for reelection this November – but Speaker Madigan is – and the ballot box is the best place to start when it comes to rooting them out of power and restoring honesty and transparency to Illinois’s politics.

They’ll do whatever it takes to dodge accountability for their actions for as long as they can, but this is a fight that we can’t afford to lose.

**Friend, the career politicians who run Illinois have been far too corrupt for far too long. Will you join me in the fight to root out corruption in our state by adding your name to our petition below?**
[**ADD YOUR NAME: STAND UP AGAINST THEIR CORRUPTION**](http://links.lahoodforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d5887efe66684ada97976ef2e9d70137&_m=d0999009747b4de8bb596688cebe4677&_e=_xEX-pBz-leNAheRztf42vIos6p1YWu7kjZAPpwHRlCWrkhytmOWRgrDQjLsyh0op4uFrgkd7bal2PPFetWRKTiC1kW74eU9J-s-Fvh3WK8vFeD7TWWzHvKyxf1gCe7U8WoIJMGXY-A-GqiKqtFR_vA5AVFKb3AP8UU6Mcy0b9hXa95Mnsqe_85wgwvlLF7eOB5Ymy747GKh3_GyCLET8IYpGL6ogWzfS3PX_clMecXwnxOAqVW3RGAp8aT0YDEef1RnHX5Kg2-VCa7lLGjy_n5EBNihrBRoYPZ1p6mTxupPQEWOLDz5wQKIrSLg1t1ckKP_spHsJDnPyXfeCelEm9Kwe3sFUIpH9YZUE25hSgrMBBNUcbN7q0UhCu-D7r1Nfegj4fMfviflsoL2mcVDnNMIe53o0uj-c3sTaUqSkdQDbcxTARMenmpIFmsPTM5vCbDUU_Ay75dj8oBh33R3t3t1gShfE0TDxmgQgIPvjTs6OblJ9BImCqeCLqzrntdl)
Thank you for fighting with me,
Darin LaHood

name: Kevin Hern
subject: THIS is what we’re fighting for
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Hern For Congress
body:
We can’t let the Democrats steal away our future. Read more >>
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/b8ae7e8e682fedba/5e246f0d7de8bba2c3d6b838967d376c/34143) Peter, Have you been watching the Republican National Convention? Yesterday’s theme was “Land of Promise.” Today’s theme is “Land of Opportunity.” I wanted to take a moment to touch on this, because it’s something I know a great deal about – and the stakes are high. President Trump and our Republican Party are fighting to Keep America Great – to keep the American Dream alive for our children, grandchildren, and generations to come – while the Democrats seek to drag our great country down the path to socialist ruin. This is the great truth that many Democrats refuse to recognize: **America is a beacon of hope to people around the world, because it is the BEST place in the world for people of all backgrounds to rise out of poverty to prosperity**. I’d like to share a bit of my personal story. I wasn’t born into privilege. Far from it, in fact. From an early age, I learned the value of hard work... and I put my strong work ethic to work to accomplish my goals. As a child, I grew up on an Air Force base. I developed a deep appreciation for the tough jobs our men and women in uniform sign up for, and the sacrifices that military families make for the greater good of our country. In high school, I earned an Architectural Drafting Certificate, and utilized the skills I learned to work and pay my way through college, earning a degree in Engineering. I went on to work as an Aerospace Engineer for Rockwell, and begin several small business ventures – including writing computer programs for businesses, real estate, and hog farming. In 1999, I literally sold the farm to buy two McDonald’s restaurants in Muskogee... and later started an organization that owns multiple McDonald’s restaurants and employs hundreds of people in the greater Tulsa area. I know what it means to live the American Dream, Peter. And I’m proud to fight for the future of the American Dream in Congress. Thank you, as always, for standing with me in this fight. The 60-day drive to November 3rd is coming up fast... and I’ll be counting on your help along the way! For Oklahoma & America, Kevin Hern | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/b8ae7e8e682fedba/19de5ae9004145b7c3d6b838967d376c/34143) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/b8ae7e8e682fedba/a55dada56efc557bc3d6b838967d376c/34143)

clean_body: We can’t let the Democrats steal away our future. Read more >> Peter, Have you been watching the Republican National Convention? Yesterday’s theme was “Land of Promise.” Today’s theme is “Land of Opportunity.” I wanted to take a moment to touch on this, because it’s something I know a great deal about – and the stakes are high. President Trump and our Republican Party are fighting to Keep America Great – to keep the American Dream alive for our children, grandchildren, and generations to come – while the Democrats seek to drag our great country down the path to socialist ruin. This is the great truth that many Democrats refuse to recognize: America is a beacon of hope to people around the world, because it is the BEST place in the world for people of all backgrounds to rise out of poverty to prosperity. I’d like to share a bit of my personal story. I wasn’t born into privilege. Far from it, in fact. From an early age, I learned the value of hard work... and I put my strong work ethic to work to accomplish my goals. As a child, I grew up on an Air Force base. body:
Today, I'm very happy to endorse eight more terrific Democratic candidates for the U.S. House. They'll help keep and expand our House majority. They'll fight for bold reforms and put people first, not | | | [](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525056/45c30650/1c21e5d4d/66e82774/2483024604/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
After last week's Democratic National Convention, I'm feeling even more fired up to make sure we win big this November -- up and down the ballot.

So today, I'm very happy to endorse eight more terrific Democratic candidates for the U.S. House.

They'll help keep and expand our House majority. They'll fight for bold reforms and put people first, not special interests. And they're counting on grassroots supporters to lead them to victory this November:

**Angie Craig (Minnesota's 2nd District)

Qasim Rashid (Virginia 1st)

Cindy Axne (Iowa 3rd)

Gil Cisneros (California 39th)

Ilhan Omar (Minnesota 5th)

Jon Hoadley (Michigan 6th)

Dana Balter (New York 24th)

J.D. Scholten (Iowa 4th)

** **[If you're able to, will you make a donation to help elect Warren Democrats like these across the country? $2 or whatever you can contribute would make a real difference to support our grassroots organizing.](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525056/45c30650/1c21e5d4d/66e82777/2483024604/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6IndkLWF1ZzIwZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNVTE0Rl9BTk5fRU5EX0VfMjAyMDA4MjVfVjFTMV9QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/wd-aug20fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMU14F_ANN_END_E_20200825_V1S1_P")**

Angie, Qasim, Cindy, Gil, Ilhan, Jon, Dana, and J.D. are exactly the kinds of leaders we need more of in Washington.

They're committed to rooting out corruption, leveling the playing field for working people, and making real, systemic change to address the root causes of the crises we face today.

And that's what we can start to achieve in January 2021 -- with Joe Biden and Kamala Harris in the White House, Democrats back in control of the Senate, and an expanded Democratic majority in the House.

But in the next few months, Republicans will try every trick in the book to suppress the vote and sling mud at our candidates.

As Warren Democrats, we're ready to fight back -- but our plan relies on grassroots supporters like you.

[If you're in a place to make a donation right now, please chip in to help elect Warren Democrats and fight for the big, structural change we need.](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525056/45c30650/1c21e5d4d/66e82777/2483024604/VEsEAw/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6IndkLWF1ZzIwZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNVTE0Rl9BTk5fRU5EX0VfMjAyMDA4MjVfVjFTMV9QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/wd-aug20fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMU14F_ANN_END_E_20200825_V1S1_P")

Thanks for being a part of this,

Elizabeth

| [**DONATE NOW**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525056/45c30650/1c21e5d4d/66e82777/2483024604/VEsEAg/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6IndkLWF1ZzIwZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNVTE0Rl9BTk5fRU5EX0VfMjAyMDA4MjVfVjFTMV9QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/wd-aug20fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMU14F_ANN_END_E_20200825_V1S1_P")

name: Nancy Mace
subject: we need to keep pushing
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nancy Mace for Congress |
body:
Friend, you can bet the House on that (pun intended). | |
---
[ ](http://links.email.nancymace.org/u/click?_t=b7e0c98b86c6435ea03767402a51b3fc&_m=9dcd57188d914e148bdec1a2746f807b&_e=CtFKP4l_ToPdnz4I6zItp13JOxsNJQoNCWQVOh9mPV28wAeAsbTmj8kIX4JQ13QECH1DIAyzmKKY9x5S3IW_DCBQj1J20fqY8P-evjUs4teJ771cf5iSdD7MM5_HuikIqQBSd_4aPE7jrLrMsEAuk-kZ1W7fxVN6y9WSJtQTKbkoRDF1mb2R8FBAmQnStuiieDHVnnNwqNkrnkI3GIUjGIKF0qUs6V0cHPbjHkyKu-OMD_FXbItMZ1vdFtVyJBKoKZbFvAZ2JPgVYOXMdKYnB_9O1qIRuqYmc7TlHQpRrIDK6g7TFtmRSGvbB3Z3NR8aBrSETK9GUq8XgYIvmhHmI8aPjo7rewSTvr01edlesp1zmNqsmU-2ScUfV2i3jgBQttDELITRzKrP2XxVAvxdn_DeHTakwlnShnFdm-wBalQ%3D)
|
---
Friend,

_We’re in the final sprint to Election Day and my progressive opponent is on the ropes. _

I’m going to be going all-out and giving 110% every single second of every single day until November 3rd.

**Friend, you can bet the House on that (pun intended). **

We have an amazing opportunity to restore principled, conservative leadership to our district and we need to do everything we can to take advantage of it. There’s no quit in me, and I know there’s no quit in our grassroots movement.

That’s why I’m setting a simple goal for our end of month fundraising campaign in August - **[150 unique donors.](http://links.email.nancymace.org/u/click?_t=b7e0c98b86c6435ea03767402a51b3fc&_m=9dcd57188d914e148bdec1a2746f807b&_e=CtFKP4l_ToPdnz4I6zItp13JOxsNJQoNCWQVOh9mPV28wAeAsbTmj8kIX4JQ13QECH1DIAyzmKKY9x5S3IW_DCBQj1J20fqY8P-evjUs4teJ771cf5iSdD7MM5_HuikIqQBSd_4aPE7jrLrMsEAuk-kZ1W7fxVN6y9WSJtQTKbkoRDF1mb2R8FBAmQnStuiieDHVnnNwqNkrnkI3GIUjGPJFIAKgnClQvPnotdnr1MXO05J-VQGBg27DM3H7-S6PSh37HnE9s1VNF-fGll19mPFXbhLbWWGKvqqQ84Kr8RtKcXe17rXProVj2HaXq6kGFod3kZpHc9Clq0Yn4tUOmzEk-tcStu01JbAz3KvoOvgpf45RvdthE8Gyo6EbRi-Un5_8UAkei9FYKrMJr_IsSrJl6SSUZa6NfeV0As8w6M8%3D)**

Our campaign is about getting as many conservatives as we can to buy-in to our mission - restoring real leadership to our district, winning one of the most competitive House races in the country, and turning a seat red in the process.

I want you to be involved, and to be able to put some skin in the game — no matter who you are, or what walk of life you are from.

That’s why August’s goal is about donors, not dollars.

Friend, can I count on you to come through for me before the end of the month?

_Whether you can chip in**[$10, $20, $50, $100 (or even just $3),](http://links.email.nancymace.org/u/click?_t=b7e0c98b86c6435ea03767402a51b3fc&_m=9dcd57188d914e148bdec1a2746f807b&_e=CtFKP4l_ToPdnz4I6zItp13JOxsNJQoNCWQVOh9mPV28wAeAsbTmj8kIX4JQ13QECH1DIAyzmKKY9x5S3IW_DCBQj1J20fqY8P-evjUs4teJ771cf5iSdD7MM5_HuikIqQBSd_4aPE7jrLrMsEAuk-kZ1W7fxVN6y9WSJtQTKbkoRDF1mb2R8FBAmQnStuiieDHVnnNwqNkrnkI3GIUjGIPDDU2zQV4x1GTmQwi6STS4TbY9hjW7NZ__uEtE-SMXcEW3vRluqTtvmm6Kfpz6wmnlknSakNDopdzFqjpFzukaS9vF3Gin-ElqkwfR0iGyPXiyuC-D8e4n42S3LE3KNPoKdnCCotUawi8y1ahoMSmpiR-Ziijkd5nw2_P_IYmRFMcjRfO0UN-qK2Zf9ew7R-cK8uM198KVs4khdGaPWA0%3D)** I want your support. _

If you want to help me reach our end of month goal of 150 unique donors before midnight on August 31, please use the link below to chip in any amount.

**[https://secure.winred.com/nancymace/action-1468881/August-goal/150-donors/dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://links.email.nancymace.org/u/click?_t=b7e0c98b86c6435ea03767402a51b3fc&_m=9dcd57188d914e148bdec1a2746f807b&_e=CtFKP4l_ToPdnz4I6zItp13JOxsNJQoNCWQVOh9mPV28wAeAsbTmj8kIX4JQ13QECH1DIAyzmKKY9x5S3IW_DCBQj1J20fqY8P-evjUs4teJ771cf5iSdD7MM5_HuikIqQBSd_4aPE7jrLrMsEAuk-kZ1W7fxVN6y9WSJtQTKbkoRDF1mb2R8FBAmQnStuiieDHVnnNwqNkrnkI3GIUjGP6e7Jqm_JVvdQVbVh-g3SSGI1XcZolVgjf2GdzDtjhcMODRsYnN_yh7KzvQWRNsOB5-U7afWIYCUlJ8OyOJHAgxgcd_m61lnZpKKd2x_sHAGUnRQCRL59JXqDABo36pGW7rHhmXQusKc2zsLev6vrAoPf9598GNdk8y4SpBs-D73XW0Wq2d-ANFO_IMDKEk49C5ZxcaFo-g1dlF2pmMxEs%3D)**

Thank you for your support - it means the world to me.

Sincerely,

Nancy Mace

Friend,
Four years ago, Donald became the 2016 Republican Nominee for President of the United States.

Since then, he has worked tirelessly every single day to Make America Great Again. He has proven time and time again that he will do whatever it takes to keep his promise to put America First.

Unfortunately, the Democrats and the opposition media are doing everything they can to discredit Donald. From false accusations to spreading their fake news, they want it to appear that he does not have the support of America’s voters.

It’s clear that the Left could not be more wrong. I have traveled around the Nation and met countless Patriots, and it could not be more apparent that Donald has won over the American People.
The President needs your support right now. The Election is in 70 days, and the best way we can help secure four more years is by coming together as a strong, unified movement.

http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=eefe5d15d1979c37f267ac86e21cca1eb3cc44e40b25afa8a9e5ddf9091e61456eddcb56111e9634c7b944811b3a6bae8f1978dc7587fb11

As I shared with you in my speech at the 2020 GOP Convention, my husband’s vision of a better, stronger, safer America is resonating with people all across the Nation.

I know that under Donald’s continued leadership and his critical America First Agenda, our nation will once again look forward to a booming economy, record job creation, low taxes, fewer government regulations, and a stronger position in the world. However, all of that will disappear if a radical left-wing Democrat takes over the White House.

I know you realize how much is at stake in November. As your First Lady, I am humbled and honored to do all that I can for America, and today, I am proud to do all I can to help my husband win this November.

name: Terry Neese
subject: The polls are open!
body:
Did you vote? What's your plan to? Dear Friend,It's Election Day in Oklahoma. I have really been looking forward to this day, and I hope you have too! We're working toward something big, and today is the biggest day yet in this journey. Even if you've already voted, I'm asking for your help today for TWO huge reasons. [Join Terry - $10](https://terryneese.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pkkdutk-elutjhyju-r/) [Join Terry - $20](https://terryneese.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pkkdutk-elutjhyju-y/) First, because **we need to do everything we can to make sure we win today,** and that includes our last-minute efforts to get people to the polls! And second, because after tonight we need to **hit the ground running** toward November! [Join Terry - $10](https://terryneese.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pkkdutk-elutjhyju-t/) [Join Terry - $20](https://terryneese.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pkkdutk-elutjhyju-i/) **I 'm running to help our economy rebound, **with the insight and experience as national co-chair of President Trump's small business advisory council.**I'm running to defend the Second Amendment and the right to life, secure the border, and support our military and veterans.** With your vote today, and your support, we can achieve these important goals - together.[Are you with us?](https://terryneese.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pkkdutk-elutjhyju-d/) [Unsubscribe](https://terryneese.cmail19.com/t/t-u-pkkdutk-elutjhyju-h/)

name: Alice, Team Warner Deputy Campaign Manager
subject: Mark Warner yard signs are here!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
Show the neighborhood you're with #TeamWarner
|
---

| | Derek --

Great news: Mark Warner yard signs are now available! These signs are free and ready to be distributed so you can proudly represent Team Warner at home. Whether you're showing your support through a donation to the campaign, a social media post, or with a sign in your yard, **THANK YOU** for supporting our team. | [](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85db32/53d9897e/5427c60b/1c883525/827073306/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjcyNyJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-db?refcode=20200825_f_1_nd__727__&refcode2=graphic&amount=5")
---
_Kelsey from Team Warner shows off her 2020 yard sign._
Due to the ongoing coronavirus pandemic, we're changing the way distribution looks to keep you safe. **On Saturday, August 29 and Sunday, August 30, Team Warner will be holding a socially distant distribution day around the Commonwealth from 12-5PM in the following locations:**

Saturday, 12PM-5PM:
Alexandria: 1406-B Leslie Ave, Alexandria, VA 22314
Charlottesville: 969 2nd St. SE, Charlottesville, VA 22902
Harrisonburg: 850 W Market St, Harrisonburg, VA 22801
Roanoke: 1917 Franklin Road SW, Unit 111, Roanoke, VA 24014
Richmond: 105 N 17th Street, Richmond, VA 23219
Virginia Beach: 5600 Virginia Beach Boulevard, Units 104-105, Virginia Beach, VA 23462

Sunday, 12PM-5PM:
Hampton: 1026-E Settlers Landing Road, Hampton, VA 23669

Meet the team outside the distribution site and wear your mask. If you are unable to attend, stay tuned for more distribution days.

Our team has been working tirelessly to make sure that folks in the Commonwealth have the resources they need during these unprecedented times and to get the word out about Mark Warner's priorities. We need your help in this final stretch. We greatly appreciate the support you've given our team thus far, and we hope we can count on it as the clock runs down to Election Day.

**[As we continue our efforts, can we count on you to make a contribution to support Mark's re-election campaign?](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85db32/53d9897e/5427c60b/1c883523/827073306/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjcyNyJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-db?refcode=20200825_f_1_nd__727__&refcode2=ask1&amount=5")**

Every dollar truly makes a difference on the road to sending Mark back to Washington. Thank you for your support.

-- Alice, Deputy Campaign Manager

P.S. Want to show your support online too? We have virtual yard signs available for Facebook -- just search "Mark Warner" when selecting a frame for your profile picture.

[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85db32/53d9897e/5427c60b/1c883521/827073306/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjcyNyJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-db?refcode=20200825_f_1_nd__727__&refcode2=cont&amount=5")

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: ‘This program is a miracle’
body:
When President Trump visited North Carolina yesterday, he traveled to exactly the kind of community he promised to help when he took office. | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=2fd1c79fd6&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • August 25, 2020
---
| | |
# **‘This program is a miracle’**

**When President Trump** visited North Carolina yesterday, he traveled to exactly the kind of community he promised to help when he took office more than three years ago—places with hardworking, blue-collar Americans that are often overlooked by Washington.

**Mills River,** North Carolina, has about 7,500 residents. It’s also home to Flavor 1st Growers and Packers, a farmer-owned repacking and distribution facility.

🎬 [**President Trump: The Great American Comeback is underway!**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=c8acfe5012&e=3ee4985eea)

**“When the China virus** struck our nation, many farmers had no place to send their crops or livestock. At the same time, families across the country were in need of groceries. They wanted to eat well,” President Trump told workers and others gathered at the facility yesterday.

**“That’s why we launched** the Farmers to Families Food Box program. Through this program, the Department of Agriculture is purchasing food from farmers, then local distributors pack and deliver the boxes. And families in need get it.”

**The 185 employees** at Flavor 1st alone pack about 7,000 of these boxes each week. In total, the Farmers to Families program has delivered _70 million_ boxes across America.

**“This program is a miracle.** It works for everybody,” said Zach Derstine, the president of food distribution company in Pennsylvania. Derstine says the food box program saved his company amid the global COVID-19 pandemic.

🎬 [**Ivanka Trump: 70 million boxes of fresh produce and counting**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=452f6d8a4c&e=3ee4985eea)

**More than 100 million meals** have been provided under the program, amounting to more than 1 billion pounds of food delivered. Yesterday, President Trump announced that an additional $1 billion will be provided to keep the program going this fall.

**Throughout the pandemic** , President Trump has fought for American workers and families—both signing legislation and taking executive action to deliver direct payments, extend unemployment benefits, halt evictions, provide student debt relief, and more.

**Now, as the Great American Comeback **unfolds, three Coronavirus vaccine candidates are in the final phase of clinical trial tests. The Administration expects to have a vaccine available before the end of the year, if not sooner.

🎬 [**Secretary Perdue: Farmers and families needed help. We took action.**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=a9639b7fbf&e=3ee4985eea)

📖 [**Ivanka Trump: Food Box Program boosts U.S. economy**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=85c86a39dc&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## **Hurricane season is here: Stay safe and informed!**

**President Trump** received a briefing today on the statuses of both Tropical Depression Marco and Hurricane Laura, the latter of which is expected to make landfall along the Gulf Coast as a major category 3 storm this week.

**While Tropical Depression Marco** continues to weaken, Hurricane Laura continues to strengthen. President Trump has directed his Administration to continue working with state and local partners, and he encourages all individuals to follow guidance from their local emergency management officials and take early action to protect themselves.

**“We are actively working** with all state officials to monitor and prepare for Hurricane Laura,” FEMA Administrator Pete Gaynor tweeted today. “Our FEMA team is already deployed and ready to support on the ground.”

⚠️ [**Stay informed: What to do before, during, and after a hurricane**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d95ac43eaf&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## Photo of the Day
---
|
---
| **President Trump delivers remarks in support of the Farmers to Families Food Box distribution program** | August 24, 2020
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=23214b18ec&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=02414b4068&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=671c3e7b0a)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

Now, as the Great American Comeback unfolds, three Coronavirus vaccine candidates are in the final phase of clinical trial tests. The Administration expects to have a vaccine available before the end of the year, if not sooner. 🎬 📖 | | Hurricane season is here: Stay safe and informed! President Trump received a briefing today on the statuses of both Tropical Depression Marco and Hurricane Laura, the latter of which is expected to make landfall along the Gulf Coast as a major category 3 storm this week. While Tropical Depression Marco continues to weaken, Hurricane Laura continues to strengthen. President Trump has directed his Administration to continue working with state and local partners, and he encourages all individuals to follow guidance from their local emergency management officials and take early action to protect themselves. “We are actively working with all state officials to monitor and prepare for Hurricane Laura,” FEMA Administrator Pete Gaynor tweeted today. “Our FEMA team is already deployed and ready to support on the ground.” ⚠️ | | Photo of the Day | | President Trump delivers remarks in support of the Farmers to Families Food Box distribution program | August 24, 2020 | | | | | | The White House 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111

body:
Are you watching? Join your local Republican team for watch parties throughout the state and let's Keep America Great!

View this email in your browser (https://us11.campaign-archive.com/?e=1acd9bb3d6&u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=0a46ccb96e)

https://www.facebook.com/ChairmanHupfer/posts/166872704928123?mc_cid=0a46ccb96e&mc_eid=[UNIQID]

Hoosier Republican,

Did you watch Night One of the Republican National Convention yesterday? If so, you heard from everyday Americans how President Trump, Vice President Pence and Republicans in Congress are Keeping America Great!

There's more great programming tonight, with more big speeches -- including from First Lady Melania Trump! You can watch the convention live starting at 8:30 p.m. ET/7:30 p.m. CT across TV and streaming, including here on YouTube (https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=gZRQL7jxsPE&feature=emb_title&mc_cid=0a46ccb96e&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) .

And then tomorrow and Thursday, when Vice President Pence and President Trump give their acceptance speeches, you have a choice -- watch at home, or join a local Republican watch party near you!

Social distancing will be observed, and face coverings will be required at each event.

To update and correct your information [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b7ef/1cd0ac28/16e53bf22/357f35eb/4061037818/VEsEBQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/update-your-information"). If you would like to unsubscribe, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b7ef/1cd0ac28/16e53bf22/357f35e9/4061037818/VEsEBw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Unsubscribe").

Peter, thank you so much for supporting Joe Biden's Presidential campaign.

[ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b7ef/1cd0ac28/16e53bf22/357f35e8/4061037818/VEsEBg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer&refcode=email-bsd-20190515host-b20_FDR_states_NA-F1_S1_C1")

This isn't the time to be complacent. If you are ready to fight for the soul of this nation, you can start by donating to elect Joe Biden by clicking the button below.

| [DONATE TO ELECT JOE BIDEN »](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b7ef/1cd0ac28/16e53bf22/357f35e7/4061037818/VEsEAQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2019.08.07_B8_footer_X__F1_S1_C1__footer&amount=25")
---

We know we send a lot of emails, and we are sorry about that. The reason? We are relying on grassroots supporters like you (we're serious!).

But Peter, we don't want to bother you. If you'd like to only receive our most important emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b7ef/1cd0ac28/16e53bf22/357f35ea/4061037818/VEsEAA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). If you'd only like to receive volunteer emails, [click here.](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b7ef/1cd0ac28/16e53bf22/357f35e6/4061037818/VEsEAw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/volunteer-emails") If you'd like to unsubscribe from our emails, you can [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b7ef/1cd0ac28/16e53bf22/357f35e9/4061037818/VEsEAg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Unsubscribe").

To make a contribution by mail, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b7ef/1cd0ac28/16e53bf22/357f35e5/4061037818/VEsEDQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://joebiden.com/contribute-by-mail/") for instructions.

We sincerely thank you for your help and support.
\- The entire Joe Biden for President team

name: Joe Sanberg
subject: Jesse Mermell will fight for a fair economy
body:
Jesse’s primary election is a week away and she needs our help so that she can go to Congress and fight for a better future for everyone in her district.
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/18848508/241753829/-2147125543?utm_campaign=workinghero&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwMy8xLzc0NDg5IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjliMzZkZGZjLTQ2ZTctZWExMS04YjAzLTAwMTU1ZDAzOTRiYiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=qf_ahhdGgllEmvEN8yzs03nrAss8UZFgjtU5PdiKbIg=&emci=d096e4a1-39e7-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&emdi=9b36ddfc-46e7-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&ceid=7114755)
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/18848509/241753830/1100540817?utm_campaign=workinghero&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwMy8xLzc0NDg5IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjliMzZkZGZjLTQ2ZTctZWExMS04YjAzLTAwMTU1ZDAzOTRiYiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=qf_ahhdGgllEmvEN8yzs03nrAss8UZFgjtU5PdiKbIg=) Dear Peter, Working Hero PAC is proud to endorse Democratic candidate Jesse Mermell for Congress in Massachusetts’ Fourth Congressional District. Jesse has dedicated her career to fighting for a fair economy that works for everyone – from negotiating the strongest Paid Family and Medical Leave law in the country to fighting for a $15 minimum wage, equal pay and earned sick time. We know that Jesse will carry this commitment to economic justice with her to Congress. But this endorsement is also personal for me. Jesse and I first met as student activists in Boston while we were in college. She has always been guided by an authentic spirit of service and devotion to helping others. I know that she will be a fearless champion for the people of the Fourth District. Jesse’s primary election is a week away and she needs our help so that she can go to Congress and fight for a better future for everyone in her district. **Will you split a contribution between Jesse’s campaign and the Working Hero PAC today? clean_body: Jesse’s primary election is a week away and she needs our help so that she can go to Congress and fight for a better future for everyone in her district. = Dear Peter, Working Hero PAC is proud to endorse Democratic candidate Jesse Mermell for Congress in Massachusetts’ Fourth Congressional District. Jesse has dedicated her career to fighting for a fair economy that works for everyone – from negotiating the strongest Paid Family and Medical Leave law in the country to fighting for a $15 minimum wage, equal pay and earned sick time. We know that Jesse will carry this commitment to economic justice with her to Congress. But this endorsement is also personal for me. Jesse and I first met as student activists in Boston while we were in college. She has always been guided by an authentic spirit of service and devotion to helping others. I know that she will be a fearless champion for the people of the Fourth District. Jesse’s primary election is a week away and she needs our help so that she can go to Congress and fight for a better future for everyone in her district. Will you split a contribution between Jesse’s campaign and the Working Hero PAC today? name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: We can flip Texas
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE
body:
[1]Powered By People

When we started Powered by People at the beginning of the year we set out
to help Democrats win a majority in the Texas House. There were any number
of challenges to take on, so why did we pick this one?

First, if we win a majority in the Texas legislature for the first time in
twenty years, big positive changes are once again possible for Texas. For
example, with a majority we will have a check on the racial gerrymandering
and other forms of voter suppression and intimidation that have
effectively disenfranchised so many of our fellow Texans. In addition to
fair districts and upholding voting rights, a Democratic majority means we
will have the opportunity to move forward on Medicaid expansion, climate
policy, gun safety laws, and criminal justice reform.

Second, focusing on dozens of State House campaigns across Texas has the
added benefit of energizing voters for races further up and down the
ballot. That means Democratic candidates for judgeships, commissioners’
courts, Congress and U.S. Senate are all more likely to prevail. And, in
the most important Presidential election of our lives, these state house
races could generate enough energy and produce enough Democratic voters to
help Joe Biden become the first Democratic nominee to win Texas since
1976.

Third, this is totally doable. That has a lot to do with the amazing
people who are running for the State House. These are real, everyday
Texans standing up for their communities and our state, running strong
grassroots campaigns that are expanding the electorate by bringing in new
voters. They are putting in the hours on the phones and putting out a
strong vision for a better Texas. I’m confident voters will respond in
record numbers. You can also think about it this way — we are only nine
seats down from a majority, and in 2018 I won more votes than Ted Cruz in
nine of the districts our candidates need to pick up. We know these
amazing candidates can win because we’ve won these districts before!

But, they can’t do it on their own. That’s why Powered by People is here
to help.

In January we started knocking on doors in once-deep-red Fort Bend county,
not the most obvious place for Democratic organizing. But we wanted to
make sure we were leaving no one behind and taking no one for granted. If
we’re going to win the State House and other important elections, we have
to contest everywhere.

After the pandemic made in-person campaigning impossible, we took to the
phones and have now made over 20 million voter contact attempts by calling
and texting Texas voters directly. That’s on top of the more than 77,000
new Texas voters we’ve helped to register.

And we’ve been intentionally focusing on those communities which have
faced the brunt of voter intimidation and suppression in the past. We’ve
organized phone banks with the Texas Coalition of Black Democrats and the
Texas Democratic Party to reach every Black voter in Texas. And this week
we teamed up with Congresswoman Veronica Escobar to contact every voter
who lives along the Texas/Mexico border, communities that are 85% to 95%
Mexican-American.

Starting next week, we are going to take the next important step and
organize phone banks directly with the State House candidates. Thus far,
we’ve been calling Texas voters to determine their likelihood of voting
for Democrats in general. Now we’ll call into these districts with the
help of these candidates to make sure their voters know their names and
are planning on specifically voting for them.

I am counting on your help to make sure this next phase of our voter
outreach in Texas is a success. All that we’ve done so far — the 20
million voter contacts, the 77,000 new registrations — was accomplished
with volunteers from all over the country. And to make sure that these
state rep candidates are able to connect with the voters who will
determine the outcome of these elections it’s going to take more
volunteers stepping up to get the job done.

Upcoming events:
[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/43024?source=ema20200825-102686&t=1001&akid=102686%2E444211%2ExEYDO3 ]Virtual Phone Bank with local candidates and Beto
[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/43024?source=ema20200825-102686&t=1002&akid=102686%2E444211%2ExEYDO3 ]Monday, August 31, 6:30 pm CT

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/43024?source=ema20200825-102686&t=1003&akid=102686%2E444211%2ExEYDO3 ]Get more info or RSVP »

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/43025?source=ema20200825-102686&t=1004&akid=102686%2E444211%2ExEYDO3 ]Virtual Phone Bank with local candidates and Beto
[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/43025?source=ema20200825-102686&t=1005&akid=102686%2E444211%2ExEYDO3 ]Wednesday, September 2, 6:30 pm CT

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/43025?source=ema20200825-102686&t=1006&akid=102686%2E444211%2ExEYDO3 ]Get more info or RSVP »

Given what’s at stake — control of the Texas legislature ahead of a
redistricting year — and given what our work could do for the rest of the
ballot — including the Presidential election — you don’t want to wonder on
the night of November 3rd, as the returns being to roll in, what more you
could have done.

Do it all now.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/17167?t=1007&akid=102686%2E444211%2ExEYDO3 ]Join us.

Beto

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/43026?source=ema20200825-102686&t=1008&akid=102686%2E444211%2ExEYDO3 ]Contribute

clean_body: [1]Powered By People When we started Powered by People at the beginning of the year we set out to help Democrats win a majority in the Texas House. There were any number of challenges to take on, so why did we pick this one? First, if we win a majority in the Texas legislature for the first time in twenty years, big positive changes are once again possible for Texas. For example, with a majority we will have a check on the racial gerrymandering and other forms of voter suppression and intimidation that have effectively disenfranchised so many of our fellow Texans. In addition to fair districts and upholding voting rights, a Democratic majority means we will have the opportunity to move forward on Medicaid expansion, climate policy, gun safety laws, and criminal justice reform. Second, focusing on dozens of State House campaigns across Texas has the added benefit of energizing voters for races further up and down the ballot. That means Democratic candidates for judgeships, commissioners’ courts, Congress and U.S. Senate are all more likely to prevail. And, in the most important Presidential election of our lives, these state house races could generate enough energy and produce enough Democratic voters to help Joe Biden become the first Democratic nominee to win Texas since 1976. Third, this is totally doable. That has a lot to do with the amazing people who are running for the State House. These are real, everyday Texans standing up for their communities and our state, running strong grassroots campaigns that are expanding the electorate by bringing in new voters. They are putting in the hours on the phones and putting out a strong vision for a better Texas. I’m confident voters will respond in record numbers. You can also think about it this way — we are only nine seats down from a majority, and in 2018 I won more votes than Ted Cruz in nine of the districts our candidates need to pick up. We know these amazing candidates can win because we’ve won these districts before! But, they can’t do it on their own. That’s why Powered by People is here to help. In January we started knocking on doors in once-deep-red Fort Bend county, not the most obvious place for Democratic organizing. But we wanted to make sure we were leaving no one behind and taking no one for granted. If we’re going to win the State House and other important elections, we have to contest everywhere. After the pandemic made in-person campaigning impossible, we took to the phones and have now made over 20 million voter contact attempts by calling and texting Texas voters directly. That’s on top of the more than 77,000 new Texas voters we’ve helped to register. And we’ve been intentionally focusing on those communities which have faced the brunt of voter intimidation and suppression in the past. We’ve organized phone banks with the Texas Coalition of Black Democrats and the Texas Democratic Party to reach every Black voter in Texas. And this week we teamed up with Congresswoman Veronica Escobar to contact every voter who lives along the Texas/Mexico border, communities that are 85% to 95% Mexican-American. Starting next week, we are going to take the next important step and organize phone banks directly with the State House candidates. Thus far, we’ve been calling Texas voters to determine their likelihood of voting for Democrats in general. Now we’ll call into these districts with the help of these candidates to make sure their voters know their names and are planning on specifically voting for them. I am counting on your help to make sure this next phase of our voter outreach in Texas is a success. All that we’ve done so far — the 20 million voter contacts, the 77,000 new registrations — was accomplished with volunteers from all over the country. And to make sure that these state rep candidates are able to connect with the voters who will determine the outcome of these elections it’s going to take more volunteers stepping up to get the job done. name: Jon Ossoff (iPhone)
subject: Fear-mongering and Trump worship

body:
The contrast between Conventions could not be more stark. |
---
Friend,

The contrast between the Democratic Convention last week and this week's bizarre and cringeworthy Trump Convention could not be more stark.

Democrats did our level best to offer a positive vision for an America that is unified, courageous, compassionate, and hopeful.

**The Trump Convention presents no vision other than the re-election, worship, and continued enrichment of the Trump Family.**

**The President of the United States literally urged his most fanatical supporters to chant "12 More Years."**

**[In November, only a landslide victory over the Trump Family and their puppets (like Georgia Senator David Perdue) will suffice. Will you chip in $20 now to make it happen?](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2431/5b2c1286/3fb6b810/25f07c46/928645012/VEsH/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_08_25_gop_con?refcode=em_2020_08_25_gop_con&amount=20")**

Friend, the Trump Family is trying to frighten Americans with their outlandish, nightmarish vision of an America at war with itself -- at a moment when Americans are crying out for unity and healing.

The Trumps want to win this election to consolidate their power, avoid accountability for their corruption, and establish a dynasty.

But they've been surrounded by sycophants like Senator David Perdue for so long, they don't realize how ridiculous they seem to the rest of the country.

After all, the Trumps and their helpers have no accomplishments to run on. They barely mention the more than 175,000 Americans who have died of COVID-19 _on their watch_ , or the tens of millions who are unemployed as a result of the ensuing economic disaster.

**They have no plan to solve this crisis, and apparently no interest.**

**Friend, we need competent and level-headed leaders to clean up this mess -- leaders who will serve the people rather than pay desperate tribute to a pathetic, narcissistic demagogue.**

**[Please, chip in ANY AMOUNT right now to help me defeat Senator David Perdue, Trump's golfing buddy, so we can tackle this crisis with focus and competence, and then build a more decent, more just, more prosperous America that works for all of us.](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2431/5b2c1286/3fb6b810/25f07c4d/928645012/VEsA/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_08_25_gop_con?refcode=em_2020_08_25_gop_con")**
